highlights.summary:
The NEET MDS 2026 exam date has been set as May 2, 2026 (tentatively) for Sri Ramakrishna Dental College and Hospital admission to the MDS course. The registrations for the same are expected to start soon.

A few more updates are given below:

faqs.question: Is Sri Ramakrishna Dental College and Hospital worth its hype?
faqs.answer: Yes, Sri Ramakrishna Dental College and Hospital is worth its hype as the college was formed by the SNR Sons Charitable Trust and was established in 2000. The college offers a wide range of courses to students at UG and PG levels under various departments such as Orthodontics, Periodontics, Prosthodontics, Conservative Dentistry, and many more. Further, the college is mainly concerned with streams such as Medicine & Health Sciences and offers courses in full-time mode. Sri Ramakrishna Dental College and Hospital also provides assistance to students in resume building, interview preparation, and job search strategies.

faqs.question: Is Sri Ramakrishna Dental College and Hospital a good college for BDS programme?
faqs.answer: Yes, Sri Ramakrishna Dental College and Hospital is a good college for BDS programme as it has a total of 91 faculty members and more than 15,000 students enrolled in its various programmes. The college is recognised by the Dental Council of India and offers courses in affiliation with the MGR University, Tamil Nadu. Further, the college has a panel of guest lecturers to inspire students in their respective careers and to give them tips and invaluable insights in every course.

faqs.question: What is the fee for MDS at Sri Ramakrishna Dental College and Hospital?
faqs.answer: The total tuition fee for Sri Ramakrishna Dental College and Hospital MDS is ranges between INR 7.5 lakh. This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change. Candidates need to pay a course fee to confirm their seat in the college. The total fee of MDS includes components such as tuition fee, exam fee, caution deposit, etc.

To be eligible for admission to BDS courses at Sri Ramakrishna Dental College and Hospital, candidates are required to pay NEET UG application fee for admission.The application fee can be paid in an online mode via Credit Card, Debit Card, Net Banking or UPI. Further, the college offers these programmes for a duration of 5 and 3 years, respectively with a comprehensive curriculum. Sri Ramakrishna Dental College courses strive to enhance students' learning experience in order to prepare them for the industry. The college provides several opportunities to students for industry exposure, internships, and placement assistance by a dedicated placement team. Further, the college guarantees placement assistance to students and offers job opportunities in leading companies.

The placement cell operates throughout the year to facilitate networking between companies and graduates. Further, the college provides assistance to students in resume building, interview preparation, and job search strategies.

admission_process.title: Sri Ramakrishna Dental College and Hospital Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Sri Ramakrishna Dental College and Hospital admission 2025 isongoingon the college's official website. The college provides UG and PG courses in the field of Dental Science.Sri Ramakrishna Dental College and Hospitaloffers entrance-based admission to all the courses. Admission to BDS and MDS courses is based onNEET UGandNEET MDSscores, respectively. To get admission, candidates must apply and appear for the entrance exam and score a good aggregate. Read the below article to know more details about Sri Ramakrishna Dental College and Hospital admission, inclusive of course eligibility, selection criteria and admission process:

Sri Ramakrishna Dental College and Hospital accepts NEET for BDS and MDS courses for admission. The college offers these courses as their popular programmes. These courses are offered in full-time mode. The below table contains Sri Ramakrishna Dental College and Hospital admission highlights 2025:
Particulars
Sri Ramakrishna Dental College and Hospital Admission Highlights 2025
Mode of study
Programmes Offered
2 excluding specialisations
Application Status
How to apply?
-NEET UG Application
-NEET MDS Application
Level of programmes offered
UG, PG, PhD
Popular programmes
NOTE:The information available in the above table is sourced from various sources on the internet. Hence, is indicative.

Sri Ramakrishna Dental College and Hospital admission is carried out in online mode. The college offers entrance-based admission to UG and PG courses. The college offers undergraduate and postgraduate courses includingBDS and MDS.Below is the table containingSri Ramakrishna Dental College and Hospital coursesalong with their eligibility and selection criteria:
Course Name
Common Eligibility
Selection Criteria
- Class 10 and Class 12 in PCB with 50% aggregate from a recognised board
-Candidate must be at least 17 years of age on or before 31st December of the year of admission
NEET UG+ Counselling
BDS from a recognised university/university
NEET MDS+ Counselling

Sri Ramakrishna Dental College and Hospital admission process contains various steps. To be eligible for admission, candidates are to follow all the steps. The admission process starts with applying for their desired courses by visiting NEET UG and NEET MDS official websites. The below steps contain the Sri Ramakrishna Dental College and Hospital admission process 2025:
Step 1: Application Process 2025

To be eligible for admission to any courses at Sri Ramakrishna Dental College and Hospital, candidates are required to fulfil the eligibility requirements before applying for admission. To apply for admission candidates are first required to apply for NEET UG and NEET MDS for admission to BDS and MDS, respectively by visiting their official website. Additionaly, candidates are required to visit the college's official website to fill out the application form.
Step 2: Selection Process
The college selected candidates for UG and PG courses based on the entrance exam. The college accepts NEET UG and NEET MDS entrance exam scores for admission.
Step 3: Counselling Round

After candidates fill out the selection criteria they are required to apply and appear forNEET UG counsellingandNEET MDS counsellinground for final seat allotment. To apply for the counselling candidates are required to visit their official website.
Step 4: Merit List & Final Seat Confirmation

Once the selection rounds are completed, the college releases a merit list of the shortlisted candidates. Shortlisted candidates are required to pay theSri Ramakrishna Dental College and Hospital feeto confirm their seats in the college.

courses_data.description: Sri Ramakrishna Dental College and Hospital admission to BDS is entrance-based, followed by counselling. The college accepts NEET-UG scores and NEET-UG counselling for admission. Sri Ramakrishna Dental College and Hospital offersBDSat UG level for five years. To grab admission, candidates are required to apply and appear for NEET UG entrance exam, followed by a counselling round. Additionally, candidates must pass Class 10 and Class 12 with 50% aggregate or equivalent examinationsinphysics, chemistry, andbiology/biotechnologyfrom a recognised board. The final seat allotment is granted based on the marks obtained in NEET UG exam and counselling round. Please read the following section for more information aboutSri Ramakrishna Dental College and Hospital BDS admission 2025, including fees and seat intake.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission at Sri Ramakrishna Dental College and Hospital?
faqs.answer: No, Sri Ramakrishna Dental College and Hospital offers entrance-based admission to UG and PG courses. For admission in BDS courses, the candidates are required to appear for NEET-UG conducted by NTA. For admission in PG courses, the candidates need to appear for NEET-MDS conducted by NBEMS. Additionally, candidates are required to fulfil the basic eligibility for admission. The basic eligibility criteria for BDS is to pass Class 10 and Class 12 with 50% in PCB. Further, for admission to MDS, candidates are required to pass BDS degree from a recognised university/institute.

faqs.question: Does Sri Ramakrishna Dental College and Hospital accept NEET MDS score?
faqs.answer: Yes, Sri Ramakrishna Dental College and Hospital accepts NEET MDS score for admission to its MDS courses. All dental colleges accepting NEET MDS scores will grant admission on the basis of the NEET MDS cutoff. To be eligible for admission candidates are required to score a good aggregate NEET MDS to grab the seat at Sri Ramakrishna Dental College and Hospital in MDS.

highlights.summary: The NEET UG 2026 registration window is now closed for admission to the MBBS, BDS, and other courses. The exam is scheduled for May 3, 2026.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: offers diverse programmes at UG and PG levels in Full Time mode. The offered programmes can be chosen from stream such as Medicine & Health Sciences. At the UG level, candidates have the provision to opt from courses such as BHMS. Whereas, at PG level, Homoeopathic Medical College, Bharati Vidyapeeth offers courses such as MD. Homoeopathic Medical College, Bharati Vidyapeeth fee structure for all the courses is around INR 6,55,050 to 12,65,000.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Homeopathic Medicine and Surgery (BHMS) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Teachers are very helpful and has modern infrastructure

review_content.Placements: I have joined for the course BHMS recently so I have no idea about packages and all. Our society is moving towards the homoeopathy recently. Many medical students gets the opportunity to work in the Bharati hospital itself and some of the student are recruited by the other hospitals. 100% students get internship from our university.
review_content.Infrastructure: The classrooms are much modernized and very spacious, it can accomodate 125 students at a time. Wi-Fi has good speed, students utilize this Wi-Fi service for study purpose. Labs are well maintained with all the necessary equipment. College canteen has good quality of food. Due to the covid situation the sports are not yet started.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Homeopathic Medicine and Surgery (BHMS) - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Good college, campus and facilities .

review_content.Placements: In one class, 100 students are present. Rotatory internship is compulsory for all students after the completion of the 4.5-year BHMS course. Students receive offers from homoeopathic companies or hospitals after completing all course requirements, including the internship. The college is good.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is good, but there are some things that need improvement. Wi-Fi facility is provided for all classrooms and labs. A library is also present. The library is not that big, but every book you need is available. The library also has a Wi-Fi facility.

review_summary.college_name: Bharati Vidyapeeth Homoeopathic Medical College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Homeopathic Medicine and Surgery (BHMS) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Really good educational quality provided.

content.Placements: Placement is very good, about 90% of students were placed. The package starts from 5 lakh per annum. We were offered internships in government medical colleges, which was very good for practical experience. We were posted at PHC for more experience. Very successful doctors are there to teach us.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is very good, there are laboratories for each subject, and all the specimens are well-maintained. All the staff is very well-educated, so we get a lot of knowledge from them. Hostel rooms are maintained well and are very clean. Hostel food is also good, and all nutrients are included in the meals.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Homeopathic Medicine and Surgery (BHMS) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Teachers are very helpful and has modern infrastructure

content.Placements: I have joined for the course BHMS recently so I have no idea about packages and all. Our society is moving towards the homoeopathy recently. Many medical students gets the opportunity to work in the Bharati hospital itself and some of the student are recruited by the other hospitals. 100% students get internship from our university.
content.Infrastructure: The classrooms are much modernized and very spacious, it can accomodate 125 students at a time. Wi-Fi has good speed, students utilize this Wi-Fi service for study purpose. Labs are well maintained with all the necessary equipment. College canteen has good quality of food. Due to the covid situation the sports are not yet started.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Homeopathic Medicine and Surgery (BHMS) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Good college, campus and facilities .

content.Placements: In one class, 100 students are present. Rotatory internship is compulsory for all students after the completion of the 4.5-year BHMS course. Students receive offers from homoeopathic companies or hospitals after completing all course requirements, including the internship. The college is good.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is good, but there are some things that need improvement. Wi-Fi facility is provided for all classrooms and labs. A library is also present. The library is not that big, but every book you need is available. The library also has a Wi-Fi facility.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Homeopathic Medicine and Surgery (BHMS) - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: I would recommend, but keep these things in mind.

content.Placements: Per batch, there are approximately 100 students. Since I'm in 2nd year, I'm not quite sure about the package or the placement. Through this course, we are only promised a degree. After the course, 6-month internships are compulsory in our own hospital before degree.
content.Infrastructure: The Wi-Fi facility is available. Labs lack a few instruments, but overall it's good and hygienic. The classrooms are well-ventilated and well-maintained and smart board is provided in each classroom. The washrooms are also quite hygienic. I'm a localite so I don't know much about hostel facilities.

content.Placements: About 50% of students got placed from our pass-out batch through interviews with various pharmaceutical companies like IQVIA, Sun Pharma, etc. The top roles offered by the company are sales associate, data analyst, etc. About 60% to 70% of our pass-out batch got internships in various companies and industries.
content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is excellent. It has classrooms with projectors and 10 to 12 well-equipped labs out of which 5 to 6 PG labs are fully air conditioned. It has a well-structured library with at least 10,000 books. The hostel facilities are great too. It has free Wi-Fi. It's kept clean all the time. Hostel has lifts which works 24/7.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharm.) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Good placements with more than 70%.

content.Placements: Our college offered 100% placement facility. More than 70% of students got placements in my batch. Highly reputed pharmaceutical companies came to interview our students and gave them placements. Faculty members give more support and give all instructions like how we have to give the interview or about our performance. They also give training for that.
content.Infrastructure: Labs were very big and all materials required for each experiment were present in that lab. All the students got a chance to do and learn all experiments. Digital library was one of the best advantages of this college. All the books mentioned in the syllabus were present in the library. Hostel was very hygienic and bathroom facilities were very good. Food was also good and healthy. Yearly college conducted arts fest and sports fest.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharm.) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Life in Amrita School of Pharmacy.

content.Placements: In Amrita School of Pharmacy, all students get placements. The highest package offered is 5 LPA and the lowest is 3 LPA. The top recruiting companies are Apollo Pharmacy, Dr. Reddy's, GSK, and Sun Pharma. The college provides internships for all students.
content.Infrastructure: The lab facilities available in the college are very good and well-maintained. Various equipment is available in the lab. Free Wi-Fi is available for hostellers. Students can access two libraries, the college library and the central library. The food available in the mess is not up to the mark.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharm.) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: It is pretty good and satisfactory.

content.Placements: There is 100% placement, and the average package is around 3 LPA. GSK and Dr. Reddy are top companies. The roles offered are in Marketing and R&D. My senior batch has multiple roles offered to them. TCS is also a part of the recruiting companies.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel has good infrastructure but less cleanliness compared to other hostels. The food services are also not on par with those of other hostels. The college infrastructure is pretty good. Classrooms are well-lit and have good technologies like projectors and screens.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharm.) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: The infrastructure is good, but hostel facilities are not up to mark.

content.Placements: More than 75-80% of students got placed in the last year. The highest salary offered is around Rs 40,000-45,000 per month. The average salary offered is Rs. 20,000-25,000 per month. The top recruiting company is Sun Pharma. The percentage of students who got good placements is above 85%.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has good and developed labs for experiments. We have developed machinery to use. Our classrooms have computers, and libraries are filled with books that are relevant to the topics taught. The hostel conditions are average. The food mess is average. Wi-Fi is not available in the hostel for students.

admission_overview.college_name: Amrita School of Pharmacy Course Admissions 2025: Fees, Eligibility, Dates & Application Process

admission_process.title: Amrita School of Pharmacy Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Amrita School of Pharmacy admission process 2025is bothmeritandentrance-based. The institute offers various undergraduate(BPharm)of four years duration, postgraduate (MPharmfor two years andPharmDfor three years) and doctoral(PhD)programmes for three years. Students who have given theGPATexam are given preference for MPharm and PharmD lateral entry. Candidates who have qualifiedGATE/ UGC-NET/ CSIR-NET or JRF or Research fellowship are eligible to take direct admission in the PhD programme atAmrita School of Pharmacy.
The following table gives the details of allAmrita School of Pharmacy coursesand the selection criteria:
Eligibility
Class 12 in PCB or Mathematics/ Biotechnology/ Computer Science with a minimum of 50% aggregate from a recognised board
Minimum 17 years of age and maximum 23 years on Dec 31 of admission year
Class 12 with 50% aggregate in Physics and Chemistry as compulsory subjects with Mathematics or Biology or DPharm from a PCI approved institution from a recognised institution
BPharm with 50% aggregate from the institution approved by the Pharmacy Council of India (PCI)
GPATorMerit-based+ Interview
MPharm from PCI and AICTE approved institutions or Students who have passed PharmD can also apply
Amrita School of Pharmacy courses fee is devided in to two categories which areScholarship FeeandNon-Scholarship Fee, andNRI Fee. There are other fee also which includeshostel fee, other charges.

Coming to affordability, it is one of the reasons why many leave a degree or a college. While availability of education loans and scholarships have made education accessible but the terms and conditions required to become eligible for a student loan or a scholarship often stand as a challenge.
Below mentioned is Non- Scholarship tuition fee for Amrita School of Pharmacy courses:
Tuition Fees (Investment)
Average Package (Return)
INR 5 lakh - INR 7 lakh
INR 2 lakh - INR 3 lakh
Note: Candidates must note that this information is sourced from the official website of the institute/university sanctioning body and is subject to change.

Amrita School of Pharmacy is open for eligible students. At present, more than 150 candidates can take admission in to the institute. Find below the course-wise seats intake details of Amrita School of Pharmacy, Kochi:
Seats Intake
Note: Candidates must note that this information is sourced from the official website of the institute/university sanctioning body and is subject to change.

Candidates seeking admission into Amrita School of Pharmacy, must ensure that they are meeting the above mentioned eligibility criteria. Eligible candidates can apply online on the official website of the institute. ForBPharm and PharmD admission, the institute conductsAEELexam under Life Sciences, Agriculture and Medical Sciences programmes.
Below is the step by step process for Amrita School of Pharmacy admission:
Step 1: Application
Vist the official websiteamrita.edu,and apply on the page ofSchool of Pharmacy.
Step 2: Selection Round
Step 3: Admission Offer letter
Candidates are need to accept the PAO of the Amrita School of Pharmacy.
Step 4: Fee Payment
After accepting the POA, next step is to make the payment, in AOAP only.
Step 5: Documents Submission
Respective schools are need to be given access in AOAP to view the documents uploaded by applicants. All the documents will be updated in the same portal.

courses_data.name: Amrita School of Pharmacy BPharm Admission 2025
courses_data.description: Amrita School of Pharmacy offers BPharm programme at UG level. To get into BPharm course, candidates must have passed class 12 from any recognised board. Selection to BPharm is done on the basis of rank secured in AEEL exam ( conducted by Amrita School of Pharmacy). Eligible candidates can apply online and pay the application fee of INR 550. faqs.question: What is the fee structure for BPharm at Amrita School of Pharmacy?
faqs.answer: As per the official website, the fee structure 2025 for BPharm course includes tuition fee, hostel fee, other fee etc. Find below the detailed fee structure of Amrita School of Pharmacy BPharm:CourseScholarship Fees(Tuition Fee)Non -Scholarship Fees(Tuition Fee)Other FeesHostel FeesBPharmINR 1,25,000INR 1,75,000INR 65,250INR 68,000Note: Candidates must note that this information is sourced from the official website of the institute/university sanctioning body and is subject to change.

faqs.question: Is lateral entry into BPharma courses accepted at Amrita Vishwa Vidyapeetham?
faqs.answer: Yes, BPharma courses at Amrita Vishwa Vidyapeetham are open to lateral entry. To be eligible for BPharma lateral admissions at Amrita Vishwa Vidyapeetham, candidates have cleared a D.Pharma course along with a minimum 50% aggregate in Physics, Chemistry, and either Biology and Mathematics during their Class 12 board exams. Only candidates who fulfil this eligibility criteria will be able to appear for the Amrita Vishwa Vidyapeetham entrance exam for lateral admissions into BPharma courses.

faqs.question: What is the admission fees for BPharma admissions at Amrita School of Pharmacy?
faqs.answer: Amrita School of Pharmacy BPharma admission fees for the year 2025 is unknown. The application fee for registration of AEEL is INR 550 while the admission processing charges are INR 2,500. However, the admission fees for Amrita School of Pharmacy BPharma courses may also include the first instalment of tuition fees as well. Candidates will beinformed of the admission fees when they receive the provisional offer letter for admissions.

faqs.question: Does Amrita School of Pharmacy accept GPAT score?
faqs.answer: Yes, Amrita School of Pharmacy accepts GPAT score for admission to its M.Pharm and Pharm.D (PB) programs. Candidates who have qualified GPAT are given preference in the selection process. For admission related queries, candidates can contact the Admission Co-ordinator at Amrita School of Pharmacy.

faqs.question: Can I join Amrita School of Pharmacy directly?
faqs.answer: Yes, you can join Amrita School of Pharmacy directly. Candidates who have qualified GATE/ UGC-NET/ CSIR-NET or JRF or Research fellowship are eligible to take direct admission in the PhD programme. For B.Pharm and M.Pharm, admission is based on the score in GPAT. Candidates with Diploma in Pharmacy are eligible for Lateral Entry admission in B. Pharm.

faqs.question: Can I get B.Pharma at Amrita School of Pharmacy with 75 percentile in GPAT?
faqs.answer: The information available does not directly answer the question about the B.Pharma admission criteria at Amrita School of Pharmacy. The available information provide details about the eligibility criteria for B.Tech programs at Amrita Vishwa Vidyapeetham, placement information for Manipal College of Pharmaceutical Sciences and L M College of Pharmacy, and an event at Amrita School of Pharmacy. It's recommended to directly contact Amrita School of Pharmacy or refer to their official website for the most accurate and up-to-date information on B.Pharma admission criteria.

placement_report.college_name: Amrita School of Pharmacy Placement & Salary Insights

placement_data.title: Amrita School of Pharmacy Placement Overview 2023
paragraphs: According to the Pharmacy NIRF report 2024 released by Amrita Vishwa Vidyapeetham, the median package offered during BPharm and MPharm placements 2023 stood at INR 4 LPA and INR 4.5 LPA , respectively. Further, the placement rate recorded during BPharm and MPharm placements 2023 was 100%.

Earlier, the NIRF report 2023 was out. According to the report, 23 BPharma, 32 MPharma, 5 PG (3-year), and 14 PharmD students were placed during Amrita School of Pharmacy placements 2022. The median package offered to BPharma and MPharma students was INR 4 LPA. For PharmD (3-year) and PharmD (6-year) courses, the median package offered was INR 4 LPA and INR 5.25 LPA, respectively.

reviews.review_heading: An excellent college choice.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is excellent. It has classrooms with projectors and 10 to 12 well-equipped labs out of which 5 to 6 PG labs are fully air conditioned. It has a well-structured library with at least 10,000 books. The hostel facilities are great too. It has free Wi-Fi. It's kept clean all the time. Hostel has lifts which works 24/7.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements with more than 70%.
reviews.review_text: Labs were very big and all materials required for each experiment were present in that lab. All the students got a chance to do and learn all experiments. Digital library was one of the best advantages of this college. All the books mentioned in the syllabus were present in the library. Hostel was very hygienic and bathroom facilities were very good. Food was also good and healthy. Yearly college conducted arts fest and sports fest.

reviews.review_heading: Life in Amrita School of Pharmacy.
reviews.review_text: The lab facilities available in the college are very good and well-maintained. Various equipment is available in the lab. Free Wi-Fi is available for hostellers. Students can access two libraries, the college library and the central library. The food available in the mess is not up to the mark.

reviews.review_heading: It is pretty good and satisfactory.
reviews.review_text: The hostel has good infrastructure but less cleanliness compared to other hostels. The food services are also not on par with those of other hostels. The college infrastructure is pretty good. Classrooms are well-lit and have good technologies like projectors and screens.

reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure is good, but hostel facilities are not up to mark.
reviews.review_text: Our college has good and developed labs for experiments. We have developed machinery to use. Our classrooms have computers, and libraries are filled with books that are relevant to the topics taught. The hostel conditions are average. The food mess is average. Wi-Fi is not available in the hostel for students.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college. Opportunities available here should be used appropriately.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms and labs are very well maintained. Classrooms are air conditioned. College computer lab with internet facility is available. There is a big sports ground for extra activities. College arts and sports fest are held every year. College hostel is very good. There are separate hostel for boys and girls. Both hostels are well secure.

reviews.review_heading: Review about the ASP Kochi.
reviews.review_text: College has good infrastructure and facilities. It provides all the basic necessities. Talking more about facilities, our college provides a very good lab and library, which are very essential for a pharmacy scholar. Our library has all necessary books, including the latest editions of pharmacopoeia and other important pharmacy-related books. The college also provides proper basic needs like food, mess, canteen, etc.

reviews.review_heading: D.Pharma at Amrita in a nutshell.
reviews.review_text:
We have 1 computer lab for undergraduate students and 1 other lab for PG and Ph.D. students. Both of them has AC. The PG labs has AC and they are pretty cool.
Undergraduate labs don't have AC.
The hostel is pretty strict.
Mess food is bad; only vegetarian option is available. Medical facilities are great; an ambulance is available 24/7.

reviews.review_heading: The best college in India for pharmacy course .
reviews.review_text: The college offers a well-maintained lab with qualified lab assistance, a spacious classroom with smart screens and a library with a minimum of 6,000 books and various journal papers. The hostel facility is also available with a decent meal menu. Wi-Fi, a gym, a coffee shop, play courts and study rooms are available in the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Good for studies but not for events.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure provided is the best. The labs, classrooms have good facilities and are spacious. The hostel facilities are too good. The rooms were spacious, and the bathrooms are clean. The rooms were shared by 3-4 persons. The food provided is okay but could be improved.

college_info.intro:
The flagship programmes offered at Saraswati Group of Colleges are BSc, BPharm, BEd, and MBA at UG and PG levels in a variety of Paramedical Science, Engineering, Computing, Business Administration, Hospitality & Tourism, Ayurveda, Pharmacy, Nursing, Forensic Science, and Physiotherapy disciplines. The Department of Business Administration of the institute is dedicated to imparting value- and need-based, quality management education to develop talented leaders.
The department offers an MBA programme with specialisations in HR, Finance, Marketing, International Business, IT, and Retail. The two-year PG programme has a semester pattern and a papers per semester, including an internship in the last semester. There are 210 seats available in the MBA programme. Candidates can check the popular programmes offered at the Saraswati Group of Colleges in the table provided below:

review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure for my course was quite good. Classrooms were spacious, equipped with projectors, and had clean seating. Step 2: Apply Online

Students can visit the official website of the institute and start the application procedure by registering themselves and providing the specified information, such as personal details, educational qualifications, contact information, etc.
Step 3: Selection

The institute shortlists candidates on an entrance basis. The final selection is made based on the entrance exam score, followed by an institute-level interview. content.Placements: At Max Institute of Allied and Paramedical Education, around 85% of students get placed. The highest package offered is 7 LPA, the lowest is 2.5 LPA, and the average is 4.2 LPA. content.Infrastructure: The institute provides smart classrooms and access to an e-library for academic support. There is no hostel or canteen, but affordable food options are available nearby. Medical facilities are good. Sports and games are held only on Sports Day, with certificates awarded.

paragraphs: Max Institute of Allied and Paramedical Education (MIAPE), Saket admission 2025 is open for all the courses. The college offers UG and diploma level courses with adurationoftwo/three years. The degree courses are offered in the field ofMedicine and Health Science. Max Institute of Allied and Paramedical Education (MIAPE), Saket application is conducted in online mode. The BSc courses offered at the college are affiliated with theDatta Meghe Institute of Higher Education and Research. Max Institute of Allied and Paramedical Education (MIAPE), Saket Admission 2025: Eligibility & Selection Criteria

Max Institute of Allied and Paramedical Education (MIAPE), Saket admission to all the courses is based on merit. The college admission process includes multiple steps, starting with registration, a selection round, and final seat allotment. Applicants are required to go through each of the stages to get admission. Below is more information about Max Institute of Allied and Paramedical Education (MIAPE), Saket admission process:
STEP 1: Max Institute of Allied and Paramedical Education (MIAPE), Saket Application Process 2025
Applicants are required to apply online on the official website of the college for admission.
STEP 2: Selection Rounds
Applicants are selected based on merit for BSc and diploma courses. Apart from this, applicants are required to complete the last educational qualification set by the college.
STEP 3: Merit List and Admission Confirmation
Once selection rounds are completed, the college releases a merit list. To grab and confirm the seat, applicants are required to pay the application fee at the admission receipt centre.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Dental Surgery (BDS) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: It is an excellent college and one of the best to learn and be the expert.

review_content.Placements: Most of the students start their dental clinic so I don't have an idea of placements from our college. Teachers here train you in a good way to be experts and get picked by various medical institutions.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of this college is excellent. Students are provided a good environment to study and relax. There has never been any single issue regarding infrastructure and other facilities.
review_content.Faculty: We are trained by highly qualified teachers who are experts in their respective streams. Each student is taken care of with his/her studies and teachers make sure that they go through the problems of every individual. The course curriculum is relevant and awesome.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Dental Surgery (BDS) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Our college is good, but not the best. It is good enough in an affordable fee range.

review_content.Placements: It is not the best college in the country as patient inflow is low, but it is better than many colleges. There are no placements, but students who pass out are doing well enough in their lives. The college provides internships to all the students. The college also provides MS courses as it has an affiliation with AIIMS Rishikesh.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is very good with fully air-conditioned college and hospital block. Our college provides a huge lecture hall with smart learning programs. There is a good capacity department labs with proper equipment and assistance. The hostel rooms are very good with attached washrooms. The hostel rooms are good enough to occupy only two students. Gymnasium, basketball court, badminton courts and swimming pool facility is also available here.

overview_faqs.answer: Seema Dental College and Hospital is a well-known institution for BDS, MDS courses. These programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. As per Shiksha verified reviews, Seema Dental College and Hospital has a rating of 3.6 on the basis of reviews by students. Not just this, it has also been rated 3.7 on campuslife, 3.2 on placements, 4 on faculty and 3.8 on Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: Seema Dental College and Hospital Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Dental Surgery (BDS) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Great infrastructure and facilities. The equipment is a little old but workable.

content.Placements: There are no placements offered through the college as it is a dental college. There is a compulsory 1-year internship provided by the college, and a 1500-rupee stipend is given to the interns every month. However, the passed-out students can apply to work at the college or hospital as staff.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is good. There are labs for every subject, but the facilities are old. The lecture halls have AC and are soundproof, but the mics don't work properly. The Wi-Fi is available but with very poor service. The hostel facilities are good, and AC is available. The mess food is okay only; the quality is not that good. Canteen food is great, though. A medical dispensary is available for hostellers. Volleyball, basketball, and badminton courts are available, and a swimming pool is also there.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Dental Surgery (BDS) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: A good college for hard workers.

content.Placements: We have a batch of 90 students and the college in total has seat available for 100 students. There are no placement offered after the course is done and we have to look and decide for ourselves regarding what to do after finishing BDS. Internship is provided after 4 year course and no extra fee is to be submitted for it. The students can apply for externship in other colleges.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are well ventilated with comfortable study environment. One projector screen and one green board is provided in each lecture hall. All the lecture halls are spacious. As for the hostel rooms it is spacious enough for two people and the house maintenance staff is good and works in a timely manner. Mess food is good and those who are not picky eaters will be happy with the food provided.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Dental Surgery (BDS) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: It is an excellent college and one of the best to learn and be the expert.

content.Placements: Most of the students start their dental clinic so I don't have an idea of placements from our college. Teachers here train you in a good way to be experts and get picked by various medical institutions.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of this college is excellent. Students are provided a good environment to study and relax. There has never been any single issue regarding infrastructure and other facilities.
content.Faculty: We are trained by highly qualified teachers who are experts in their respective streams. Each student is taken care of with his/her studies and teachers make sure that they go through the problems of every individual. The course curriculum is relevant and awesome.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Dental Surgery (BDS) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Our college is good, but not the best. It is good enough in an affordable fee range.

content.Placements: It is not the best college in the country as patient inflow is low, but it is better than many colleges. There are no placements, but students who pass out are doing well enough in their lives. The college provides internships to all the students. The college also provides MS courses as it has an affiliation with AIIMS Rishikesh.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is very good with fully air-conditioned college and hospital block. Our college provides a huge lecture hall with smart learning programs. There is a good capacity department labs with proper equipment and assistance. The hostel rooms are very good with attached washrooms. The hostel rooms are good enough to occupy only two students. Gymnasium, basketball court, badminton courts and swimming pool facility is also available here.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Dental Surgery (BDS) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: It is not a great place because of insufficient patients inflow in the hospital.

content.Placements: Almost 100% of the students get placed from every batch from our college. Our college also provides 100% internships in hospitals. You can open your own clinics and pursue higher degrees. MS courses are offered, and our college has a collaboration with All India Institute of Medical Science Rishikesh.
content.Infrastructure: There are well-facilitated lecture halls and highly functional laboratories. There is a playground, along with a basketball court. The mess serves good quality food, and there is a canteen with proper services. Our college has an auditorium for cultural events and two hostel buildings where there are double sharing rooms.

college_info.college_name: School of Physiotherapy, VELS Institute of Science, Technology and Advanced Studies

highlights.summary: VELS university Applications are LIVE. Apply Now

placements.overview: School of Physiotherapy, VELS Institute of Science, Technology and Advanced Studies is a private institute and is located in Chennai, Tamil Nadu. School of Physiotherapy, VELS Institute of Science, Technology and Advanced Studies courses are offered to students at the UG and PG levels. The institute offers courses in Full Time mode. School of Physiotherapy, VELS Institute of Science, Technology and Advanced Studies offers a total of 8 courses in stream such as Medicine & Health Sciences. Some of the popular courses offered at the institute are BPT and MPT. These courses are offered to students across several specialisations such as Cardiology, Neurology, Obstetrics & Gynecology and Orthopaedics. Further, the fee for all these courses ranges between INR 1,04,000 to 2,48,000. Apart from this, the School of Physiotherapy, VELS Institute of Science, Technology and Advanced Studies campus has a state-of-the-art infrastructure with all the advanced facilities.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Physiotherapy (BPT) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: This institution is renowned for its exceptional faculty and outstanding learning opportunities.

review_content.Placements: According to reports, in an academic year at our campus, over 100 students graduate. More than 75% of them are placed in different clinics and hospitals. This high placement rate showcases the quality of education and training provided by our institution. Our graduates have gone on to make a significant contribution to the healthcare field, earning recognition for their hard work and dedication. We are proud of their achievements and look forward to seeing more students follow in their footsteps in the future.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college's infrastructure is far from impressive, despite the fact that classrooms are kept clean and tidy. While there are enough fans to keep students cool, access to the internet, specifically Wi-Fi, is strictly limited to faculty members only. This means that students are unable to utilize the internet for research, assignments, or simply to stay connected with the outside world. This lack of access to a crucial resource significantly hinders the educational experience and creates a learning environment that is far from ideal. The college administration should consider expanding Wi-Fi access to students, as this would be a significant improvement to the overall infrastructure and would benefit the entire student body. This change would demonstrate a commitment to providing a modern and supportive learning environment, which is essential for the success of students in today's technologically advanced world.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Physiotherapy (BPT) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: A better place to study physiotherapy with the support and help of highly qualified professionals.

review_content.Placements: Placements are really poor. Only a few are placed, with an average package of INR 2.5 to 3 LPA. But mandatory internships are provided for all the students in different hospitals for practical and clinical knowledge for six months. After that, various roles are available for us in various fields.
review_content.Infrastructure: Physiotherapy is not on the Pallavaram campus; it is situated at the Thalambur campus, along with the Venkateshwara Dental Campus and Shree Isari Velan Mission Hospital, near OMR. Class room infrastructure is good and average, but labs and other facilities are low. For the hostel, which is located on campus, rooms are average, but the mess foods are poor.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Physiotherapy (BPT) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: In 2024, the staff is good, but it is not now for physio.

review_content.Placements: There are no placements for our course. There's no package offered in our college and no recruitment because in our course there are no placements like IT jobs, and I don’t know what to write in this box since it’s too hard to write about my college and curriculum in more than 200 characters.
review_content.Infrastructure: Classrooms and labs are available, and there is a canteen with food that is completely fine. Because of friends, we are able to survive in that college. Some staff members will really help you with many things.
review_content.Faculty: Teachers are helpful and qualified. The exams are somewhat easy. If you complete 36 pages, you will pass the exams, that's the best thing.

hostel.description: VELS University has separate hostel facility for boys and girls. Laundry facility is available to the students on chargeable basis. Mess and Canteen facility is also available for the inmates at reasonable rates.

library.description:
VELS Institute of Science, Technology and Advanced Studies has a fully automated central library with a seating capacity of 500 persons and follows Open Access System. The library has a collection of 114305 books, 137717 e-books, and 10032 back volumes. It has the subscription of more than 359 Periodicals (National & International), more than 12381 e-journals, 4106 dissertations, 4849 audio-visual resources.
It also facilitates access to e-journals from IEEE/IEL, ASME, ASCE, EBSCO, ProQuest, BENTHAM Science Pharmacy, Micromedex’s Drugdex System, Inventi Online, Nature Online, Law finder, NPTEL etc.
The library is also an associate member of Madras Library Network (MALIBNET) and Institutional member British Council Library.

review_summary.college_name: St. Wilfred's Institute of Pharmacy Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: The best infrastructure and facilities, the teaching staff is best, and management system is good.

content.Placements: Many students get jobs in this college. Approximately 50 percent of students are placed in good companies. Students enjoy their jobs. They have an interview room where interviews take place. Students get jobs of up to 6 lacs per year. Students also get jobs in the college for teaching.
content.Infrastructure: Free Wi-Fi is available, and many laboratories are available. There are two canteens available. There is also a Xerox shop available in the college. The college is situated in a spectacular view. The view during the rainy season is amazing. The classrooms are also nice.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Pharmacy (D.Pharma.) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: I am not satisfied with its placements.

content.Placements: Almost 40-60% of students got placed in our college. The highest salary package offered was 5 LPA. The top recruiting companies are Dr. Reddy, Cipla, Abbot, etc. Around 60% of students got internships in our college. In this course, the main role is to provide healthy medicines.
content.Infrastructure: In our college, classrooms, laboratory, and library are well structured. Wi-Fi is available for all students. The food served in the canteen is delicious. The canteen and mess are hygienic.
content.Faculty: Our teachers are well-experienced and qualified. Teachers are helpful to all students and they always solve students' doubts. Our college provides different course curriculum and it makes students achieve their goals. Semester exams are tough, and the passing percentage is 40%.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: The placement is good practicals are also taken very hygienic

content.Placements: The placement offered is valuable. There are 100 students in our course. The highest package is 8 Lacs per annum and the lowest package is 3 Lacs per annum. 75% of students got internship from B pharmacy course mainly in company like Cipla, DR Ortho, MacLeod. After B pharmacy you will work in company ad a medical representative, R and D department, coding department.
content.Infrastructure: It's a very good college. Some say the college has a good infrastructure and campus life, but the placement offers were mainly in sales and marketing. Placements in the college are good. Probably, 20-30 students were placed through on-campus interviews. Salaries offered range from Rs. 9,000 to about 30,000. Pharmaceutical companies visit the campus for QC, QA and other purposes.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely dissatisfied because of the placement quality.

content.Placements: Very bad placement in this college. Not even a student comes to this college. There is no placement committee in this college; it was my bad luck that I got into this college. The highest package is a 4 LPA. Which is roughly 20 thousand a month. Not worth taking.
content.Infrastructure: Very bad infrastructure of this college. Only the main building is a show off just to gain the attention of parents and students. The pharmacy department building is worse; it is too hot and there is no proper supply of electricity, which is bad. Too bad. Even fans work. Not worth taking admission.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Includes under India's top 200 colleges.

content.Placements: Certain companies, like Appolo, come for campus placement and select the best students. And the majority of the students need to find jobs by themselves. A student needs at least a 78 to 80 percentile on the CET exam for online admission. The percentile demand may be increased due to an increase in online admissions.
content.Infrastructure: The worst infrastructure has to be improved. Teachers are really good at teaching and managing. But the problem is that there is a shortage of chemicals, so students need to postpone their practices. The view of the college is really nice, especially in the rainy season. Overall, college is good and improving every year.

college_info.intro:
The Gandhigram Rural Institute popular programmes are BTech and MBA. BTech students can become Software Engineers, Civil Engineers, Data Analysts, and others. The Gandhigram Rural Institute provides placement assistance to students. The deemed to be university students are placed in top companies. The Gandhigram Rural Institute students are provided practical knowledge.
Gandhigram University students are provided with various facilities such as a hostel, modern classrooms, conference halls, and others. Below mentioned are some of the courses offered by The Gandhigram Rural Institute and their respective eligibility. The accepted entrance exams are TANCET, , and others. Candidates applying through CUET PG must first register for the CUET PG exam. Then appear for the entrance exam. With valid scores apply on the official website of The Gandhigram Rural Institute. The below-mentioned are Gandhigram University admission dates for 2025:

faqs.answer: A:    After completing MBA from the Gandhigram Rural Institute, students can get jobs in their respected domains with the decent packages and better ROI .The Institute also teaches the lessons of Gaandhiji's which will make the students more wiser and productive towards their work.
faqs.question: What are the career prospects after completing MBA from The Gandhigram Rural Institute?

faqs.answer: A:    The Gandhigram Rural Institute has not released the 2023 placement statistics yet. However, according to the NIRF report for 2023,  173 UG programme students were placed during The Gandhigram Rural Institute BCom placements in the year 2022. The median package offered to UG (three-year) students stood at INR 1.8 LPA.
faqs.question: What is the placement scenario for B.Com at Gandhigram Rural Institute?

faqs.answer: A:    The Gandhigram Rural Institute Alumni PlacementsAccording to unofficial sources, The Gandhigram Rural Institute alumni are primarily working in the Engineering sector. The pie chart below illustrates a sector-wise breakdown of The Gandhigram Rural Institute alumni:
faqs.question: Where are The Gandhigram Rural Institute alumni placed?

faqs.answer: A:    The Gandhigram Rural Institute has not released the 2023 placement statistics. However, according to the NIRF report 2023,  173 UG students were placed during placements in 2022. The median package offered to UG (four-year) students stood at INR 2.4 LPA.Note: This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.
faqs.question: What is the placement scenario for BTech at Gandhigram Rural Institute?

fees_and_eligibility.overview: The Gandhigram Rural Institute offers UG, PhD, PG, diploma, and several other courses to students. These courses are provided across, Chemistry,, and various other streams. At the UG level, the deemed to be university offers BTech, three-year BCom, BA, BBA, and other courses to students. At the PG level, the demmed to be university offers two-year MA, MCom, MSc, MBA, and other courses to students. Below mentioned are some of the courses offered by The Gandhigram Rural Institute and their respective eligibility. faqs.question: What is the fee for B.A course in Gandhigram University?

faqs.answer: A:    Most of the admissions in the Gandhigram Rural institute are based on the entrance-based qualifing examinations. Some of the seats are also alloted to the lateral entry students based on their merit based marks of Class 12 or Graduation as per the requirement of the course.
faqs.question: Are admissions at The Gandhigram Rural Institute entrance-based or merit-based?

faqs.answer: A:    The total seat intake for the BA and Integrated BA plus MA programmes offered at Gandhigram University is 120. Admission will be made subject to the reservation policy of the Government of India/ UGC Norms. The Gandhigram Rural Institute BA seat reservation policy is mentioned below:The SC/ ST applicants will be granted relaxation in admissionSeats will also be reserved for certain special categories namely, Differently Abled, Wards of Defense Personnel, Sports Persons and, candidates hailing from North Eastern Regions, Jammu and Kashmir and, PM Cares Children scheme for supporting children who have lost both parents or legal guardians or adopted parents or surviving parent due to COVID-19 pandemic.Note: This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.
faqs.question: What is the seat reservation policy for B.A at Gandhigram Rural Institute?

faqs.answer: A:    The Gandhigram Rural Institute accepts the CUET score for various UG and PG courses, such as MSc, BSc, etc, including MBA. The institute offers admission to its MBA programme based on CUET scores, and the overall cutoff in the CUET score is an important factor for admission. Gandhigram University is conducting Round 2 Counselling for MSc (few specialisations) and BSc Geology courses between Aug 23 and Aug 25. The entire course-wise schedule for the counselling is available on the official website at ruraluniv.ac.in.

reviews_list.review_title: Good facilities are available.

review_content.Placements: More than 60 percent of students were placed in our college, with a good salary package of 13 lakhs per annum and the lowest salary package of 3 lakhs per annum. More than 20 companies visited our college. A few students secured internships in other sectors. The top roles offered include ecologist and professor.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good, with facilities such as Wi-Fi, labs, a library, and classrooms available in our college. The hostel food quality is acceptable, the mess is very clean and hygienic, and a medical kit is available for emergencies. Sports and events are conducted regularly.

reviews_list.batch_info: M.Sc. in Physics - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: Honest review of this wonderful college.

review_content.Placements: Students typically become eligible for campus placements from the penultimate semester of their program. For undergraduate students, this is usually the seventh semester, and for graduate students, it could be the third semester. Google, Microsoft, Amazon, IBM, Infosys, TCS, General Electric, Siemens, Tata Motors, Larsen & Toubro, etc. are the top recruiters. Top tech companies like Google and Microsoft typically make around 5-10 offers each. Finance firms like Goldman Sachs can make 10-15 offers. The highest package was around 24 LPA, and the average package was around 4 LPA.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Ed. - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: One of the best college for B.Ed.

review_content.Placements: About 70% of students are placed in our courses. In our course, the average salary package offered is from 9 LPA to 12 LPA. The minimum salary package offered is 6 LPA, and the maximum salary package range from 15 LPA to 20 LPA. Many primary and secondary schools recruit students from our courses. 70% of students get internships from our courses in many higher secondary schools. Many introduction are given in our course.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good. We have a Wi-Fi facility. The library is spacious and well stocked with books and has a computer-generate automated system through which one can find specific books in their section by entering book names into the computer system. Classrooms are equipped with projectors and green or whiteboards. The laboratories are equipped with the necessary equipment and machinery. Hostel rooms are also good. It also has Wi-Fi and serves well-cooked food.

review_summary.college_name: The Gandhigram Rural Institute Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Botany - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: A great center for botany study.

content.Placements: The botany programme at our college has good placement opportunities for students, in research and industry. In our batch, more than 70% of students were placed. The highest package offered was 10 Lacs per annum, the lowest was 4 Lacs per annum. The average was around 5 Lacs per annum. Top recruiters included Dabur, Himalaya, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The Avadh department had great facilities, including well-equipped labs for plant tissue culture, genetics, and environmental studies. The botanical garden was an invaluable resource for practical learning, housing rare and medicinal plants. The library featured a comprehensive collection of botany journals, research papers, and books.

individual_reviews.course: PG Diploma in Sanitary Inspector’s course - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: This college does not have any ragging.

content.Placements: More than 60 percent of students were placed in our college, with a good salary package of 13 lakhs per annum and a minimum salary package of 3 lakhs per annum. More than 20 companies have visited our college. Some students have acquired internships in other sectors. Suggested top roles include ecologist and professor.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is good, with facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, a library, and classrooms available in our college. The food standard in the hostel is acceptable, the mess is very clean and hygienic, and a medical kit is available for emergencies. Sports and events are conducted regularly.

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Botany - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: Good facilities are available.

content.Placements: More than 60 percent of students were placed in our college, with a good salary package of 13 lakhs per annum and the lowest salary package of 3 lakhs per annum. More than 20 companies visited our college. A few students secured internships in other sectors. The top roles offered include ecologist and professor.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good, with facilities such as Wi-Fi, labs, a library, and classrooms available in our college. The hostel food quality is acceptable, the mess is very clean and hygienic, and a medical kit is available for emergencies. Sports and events are conducted regularly.

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Physics - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: Honest review of this wonderful college.

content.Placements: Students typically become eligible for campus placements from the penultimate semester of their program. For undergraduate students, this is usually the seventh semester, and for graduate students, it could be the third semester. Google, Microsoft, Amazon, IBM, Infosys, TCS, General Electric, Siemens, Tata Motors, Larsen & Toubro, etc. are the top recruiters. Top tech companies like Google and Microsoft typically make around 5-10 offers each. Finance firms like Goldman Sachs can make 10-15 offers. The highest package was around 24 LPA, and the average package was around 4 LPA.

individual_reviews.course: B.Ed. - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: One of the best college for B.Ed.

content.Placements: About 70% of students are placed in our courses. In our course, the average salary package offered is from 9 LPA to 12 LPA. The minimum salary package offered is 6 LPA, and the maximum salary package range from 15 LPA to 20 LPA. Many primary and secondary schools recruit students from our courses. 70% of students get internships from our courses in many higher secondary schools. Many introduction are given in our course.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good. We have a Wi-Fi facility. The library is spacious and well stocked with books and has a computer-generate automated system through which one can find specific books in their section by entering book names into the computer system. Classrooms are equipped with projectors and green or whiteboards. The laboratories are equipped with the necessary equipment and machinery. Hostel rooms are also good. It also has Wi-Fi and serves well-cooked food.

admission_process.title: Gandhigram University Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Gandhigram Rural Institute admission process is mainly entrance-based for the majority of the courses. For admission to various programmes in GRI, candidates have to submit the application through the official website.The Gandhigram Rural Instituteoffers several UG, PG and Diploma level courses under two categories which are Non-CUET Courses and CUET Courses. BVoc, DVoc and a few Diploma programmes are offered under Non-CUET, and MA, MSc, BSc, MCA, BTech, MBA, BEd etc. are offered under CUET courses categories at Gandhigram Univeristy. For a few courses, the university also accepts other national-level entrance exams, such as NTA, and TANCET.

Gandhigram Rural Institute also offers MA in Hindi, English, Rural Development Studies, Sociology, Gandhian Studies and Peace Science. The MSc programme is available in Physics, Chemistry and Mathematics. To get admission to MA in English, aspirants are required to pass graduation.

Gandhigram University is open for the admission process. The institute offers various UG and PG courses which are designed to be delivered in full-time mode. These courses are offered through eight schools which include 'English and Foreign Languages', 'Health Sciences and Rural Development', 'Agriculture and Animal Sciences' and more. Find the Gandhigram Rural University admission details below:

The basic eligibility criteria for postgraduate courses is a minimum of 50% aggregate in a graduate degree. Selection to these courses is done on the basis of CUET score. Gandhigram University fees include multiple components admission fees, tuition fees, hostel fees, exam fees, lab fees and other charges.

faqs.question: Which entrance exam scores does Gandhigram University accept for admission to BTech?
faqs.answer: Gandhigram University accepts Common University Entrance Test (CUET) scores for admission to its BTech programme. The admission criteria for the course depend on the marks secured in the Class 12. The selection process for BTech programme is based on the CUET UG exam.

faqs.question: Are UG degree marks enough for MBA admission at Gandhigram University?
faqs.answer: Gandhigram University MBA admissionis entrance-based for the academic year 2024 as candidates seeking admission to theMBA at Gandhigram Universityare required to appear for the CUET PG. Therefore, UG degree marks are not enough for admission to the MBA programme.

faqs.question: Are admissions at The Gandhigram Rural Institute entrance-based or merit-based?
faqs.answer: Most of the admissions in the Gandhigram Rural institute are based on the entrance-based qualifing examinations. Some of the seats are also alloted to the lateral entry students based on their merit based marks of Class 12 or Graduation as per the requirement of the course.

faqs.question: Does The Gandhigram Rural Institute accept CUET score?
faqs.answer: The Gandhigram Rural Institute accepts the CUET score for various UG and PG courses, such as MSc, BSc, etc, including MBA. The institute offers admission to its MBA programme based on CUET scores, and the overall cutoff in the CUET score is an important factor for admission. Gandhigram University is conducting Round 2 Counselling for MSc (few specialisations) and BSc Geology courses between Aug 23 and Aug 25. The entire course-wise schedule for the counselling is available on the official website at ruraluniv.ac.in.

faqs.question: How to apply at Gandhigram College for B.Sc?

placement_data.title: The Gandhigram Rural Institute Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: The Gandhigram Rural Institute (Deemed to be University) has not released the 2023 placement statistics. However, the NIRF report 2023 is out. As per the report, 173 UG, 148 PG and 16 Integrated PG students were placed during The Gandhigram Rural Institute placements 2022. The median package offered to UG(3-year) and UG (4-year) students stood at INR 1.8 LPA and INR 2.4 LPA . For PG courses, the median package ranged between INR 1.8 LPA and INR 2.73 LPA and for Integrated PG students, the median package offered was INR 2.52 LPA, respectively .

faqs.question: Does The Gandhigram Rural Institute offer better placements than Alagappa University?
faqs.answer: The Gandhigram Rural Institute's placements is good in terms of ROI. But when compared with the Alagappa University, Alagappa's placement is better than the Gandhigram Rural Institute because of their infrastructure and alumini networks. The Gandhigram Rural Institute has a moderate placement percentage, with 50% to 60% of students getting placement every year. On the other hand, Alagappa university's placement statistics indicate that 30-40% of students were placed in various courses, with the highest package ranging from INR 10-12 lakhs and the average package varying.

The median package offered to UG (three-year) students stood at INR 1.8 LPA.

reviews.review_heading: A great center for botany study.
reviews.review_text: The Avadh department had great facilities, including well-equipped labs for plant tissue culture, genetics, and environmental studies. The botanical garden was an invaluable resource for practical learning, housing rare and medicinal plants. The library featured a comprehensive collection of botany journals, research papers, and books.

reviews.review_heading: This college does not have any ragging.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good, with facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, a library, and classrooms available in our college. The food standard in the hostel is acceptable, the mess is very clean and hygienic, and a medical kit is available for emergencies. Sports and events are conducted regularly.

reviews.review_heading: Good facilities are available.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good, with facilities such as Wi-Fi, labs, a library, and classrooms available in our college. The hostel food quality is acceptable, the mess is very clean and hygienic, and a medical kit is available for emergencies. Sports and events are conducted regularly.

reviews.review_heading: Honest review of this wonderful college.
reviews.review_text: Rooms are equipped with essential utilities such as electricity, water, and internet connectivity. Common areas include study rooms, recreational lounges, and laundry facilities. Some hostels also have attached bathrooms or shared bathroom facilities on each floor. Meals cooked in mess are very good; they provide four meals in a day. The canteens are well-facilitated. The hostel is affordable. The registration process is done at the college official website; it may require submission of personal...

reviews.review_heading: One of the best college for B.Ed.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good. We have a Wi-Fi facility. The library is spacious and well stocked with books and has a computer-generate automated system through which one can find specific books in their section by entering book names into the computer system. Classrooms are equipped with projectors and green or whiteboards. The laboratories are equipped with the necessary equipment and machinery. Hostel rooms are also good. It also has Wi-Fi and serves well-cooked food.

reviews.review_heading: Review of The Gandhigram Rural Institute.
reviews.review_text: Hostel provides good food and accommodation for students but it doesn't serve non-vegetarian food items. Students are not allowed to get food from outside. Sports teams are good but training is not much provided.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The Chemistry department, they have excellent Faculty members who are very good at teaching. In our department, we have NMR spectroscopy and some other instrumentation. The hostel facility is above average but from what I heard now it's changed a lot better. They only provide Veg meals and other veg items. Nonveg foods are strictly prohibited on our campus.

reviews.review_heading: Infrastructure is very good.
reviews.review_text: Our department library contains all the books needed for the course, and everyone in the department can access the books easily. Our college has a good Wi-Fi network and lab facilities. Food in the hostel is average, but safety is very good. Our university has a separate health center.

reviews.review_heading: It has a nice environment with an excellent learning, good discipline and obedience.
reviews.review_text: The college has a very good infrastructure with well natural air-conditioned classes. There will be a nice environment and a Wi-Fi campus with a high-speed connection. But, the luxurious life is not possible, and there will be a poor hostel rooms infrastructure. But the auditorium is in a vast area. The water supply is also excellent without interruption. It has the simplest infrastructure, but this is a project of 2023 for the smart university. So, we can expect some improvements.

reviews.review_heading: Very much dissatisfied with the placements, experienced facilities, and good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The Gandhigram Rural Institute has a pretty decent infrastructure. The students are provided with Wi-Fi username and passwords for their academic purpose. There is a central library for all the department students, and each department also has its own library. The institute has a synthetic coated ground and has many sports activities like athletics, cricket, badminton, football, volleyball, basketball and many more. The institute has two canteens with low-cost food and three stationary stores. I...

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good knowledge to students.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is good to stay in and it serves healthy food. The hostel fee is Rs.2,000 per month. Water facilities are insufficient. Library is useful to study because it has free systems and Wi-Fi.

reviews.review_heading: Very satisfied with the fees, facilities, faculty, infrastructure, skills & knowledge provided.
reviews.review_text:
1. Our University has very good library and contains adequate number of books. Students can take books from both general library as well as from department library. Our university has good infrastructure with ventilated classrooms and it is eco-friendly, and provides free Wi-Fi for laptops. 
2. The quality of food provided in the hostel is good and affordable. Only vegetarian foods are served inside the campus. The canteen foods are also very good and it's quality was checked by the authorities ...

reviews.review_heading: My review of this college.
reviews.review_text: The course curriculum was awesome. Every semester had new subjects that provided enriched knowledge to students. They included all the programming languages needed in the industry, which helped us to succeed in the company, and they also provided skill enhancement courses. The hostel facility was good. Since it was a Gandhian institute, non-veg food was not provided. A single room was provided for a minimum of 6 students. The room was equipped with electricity and water. The use of mobile phones...

faqs.answer: A:    SVVU Tirupati offers After 10th Diploma in two specialisations. These specialisations are Animal Husbandry and Fisheries. The duration of these courses is two years. Admission to these courses is granted to applicants who have completed Class 10 with the required aggregate as specified by the university. Interested candidates can register for admission through the official SVVU website. The university released merit lists of selected candidates on the official website.
faqs.question: What all SVVU Tirupati Diploma courses can I pursue after Class 10?

faqs.answer: A:    Candidate selected for BTech (Dairy Technology) admisison at SVVU Tirupati must report to the university campus for document verification. They must submit the following original documents to finalise their admission:Pass Certificate-cum-Memorandum of Marks obtained by the candidates in the qualifying examination (Intermediate)Hall Ticket & Rank Card of Andhra Pradesh EAMCETClass 12 or equivalent examination CertificateCommunity Certificate in the case of candidates belonging to Backward Classes/Scheduled Castes/Scheduled Tribes, signed by the competent authority/the latest EWS certificateBonafide Study certificates (Class 6 onwards)Residence Certificate, if necessaryTransfer Certificate from the College or School where the candidate last studiedForm I and Form II, with evidence of land owned: Adangal/ 1B (or) Copy of Original Pattadar PassbookIn case of candidates under Special Categories (CAP / NCC / PH / Sports & Games) the original certificates issued by the competent authorities

faqs.answer: A:    SVVU offers a four-year BTech in Dairy Technology. The SVVU Tirupati BTech tuition fee is INR 40,000 for the entire duration. Besides the tuition fee, candidates are required to submit one-time fees, which include Admission fee, Students welfare fund, Students Blazars, Identity card, etc. It must be noted that the mentioned fee information is sourced from the official website of the university/sanctioning body. It is still subject to change and hence, is indicative.

reviews_list.batch_info: BVSc in Animal Husbandry - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: BVSC aims to save the animal life.

review_content.Placements: The percentage of placed students in the course is less than 50%. The highest package in the course is 150,000 thousand rupees, and top colleges are Sri Venkateswara Veterinary University. Most of the members will join internships, and other states also offer top roles in internships.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of available Wi-Fi is good and possible to use very nicely. Also, unlimited network will be available. Mostly, labs are very clean and nice, with practicals going on daily. The most important thing is that classrooms are too good, and there is also a library available for new things.

reviews_list.batch_info: BVSc in Animal Husbandry - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: Very good college for those who are determined to be a veterinary doctor.

review_content.Placements: The placements depend on your GPA at the end of the academic course. Also, the placements in the veterinary department are decided by the government itself. If the government releases any posts, then only you could apply for them and would get a job based on your merit in the college. The highest salary for a beginner would be 30k, and that's an average salary pack too. The internship is offered by the college itself for a span of 6 to 8 months, and it's mandatory for every passed-out student.
review_content.Infrastructure: The classrooms are pretty clean and tidy. Each class has a green board along with a projector for smart classes, with a Wi-Fi connection separately for each class and lab. The library is composed of thousands of books regarding this course and also general knowledge too. The labs are well-equipped to assist students in learning quickly. Although the college is good, you can't expect much from a government hostel. Rooms might be clean, but the food isn't up to the mark. Daily cleaning would be there for the rooms, and there would be enough space for 3 persons to share.
