overview_faqs.question: What is the fee for M.Tech at Sri Venkateswara Veterinary University?
overview_faqs.answer: Sri Venkateswara Veterinary University (SVVU) expenses a primary-yr fee of INR 27,405 for its Master of Technology (M.Tech) application. This two-year path is designed to offer specialised know-how in regions which include aquaculture and fish processing generation. SVVU, a prominent organization, is well-appeared for its cognizance on veterinary and fisheries sciences, presenting a whole lot of guides to satisfy the diverse hobbies of students.

overview_faqs.question: What is the total tuition fee for BTech at SVVU Tirupati?
overview_faqs.answer: SVVU offers a four-year BTech in Dairy Technology. The SVVU Tirupati BTech tuition fee is INR 40,000 for the entire duration. Besides the tuition fee, candidates are required to submit one-time fees, which include Admission fee, Students welfare fund, Students Blazars, Identity card, etc. It must be noted that the mentioned fee information is sourced from the official website of the university/sanctioning body. It is still subject to change and hence, is indicative.

overview_faqs.question: What is Sri Venkateswara Veterinary University famous for?
overview_faqs.answer: Sri Venkateswara Veterinary University has wide recognition for its extension activities in veterinary, dairy technology and fishery sciences. The faculty received many awards and appreciation for the efforts in teaching and research. The university provides hands on experience to the students in dairy technology, veterinary and in fishery sciences. The SVVU has an active placement cell and it also gives placement training to the students SVVU has a beautiful campus, well equiped class rooms,supportive faculty,digital classroom, Teaching provide to the student is excellent. Popular specialization offered by SVVU in veterinary science, fisheries sciences etc.

review_summary.college_name: SVVU Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Veterinary Science and Animal Husbandry (B.V.Sc. and A.H.) - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: It is only helpful if you are interested in treating animals.

content.Placements: We haven't had any outgoing batches from our college yet, as it is a newly established institution. The first batch, the 2020 batch, is still pursuing graduation here. However, as far as we know, after graduation, veterinarians can pursue government jobs, such as veterinary surgeons. Pet clinics are also managed by vets, and a wide range of private sectors welcomes talented veterinarians.
content.Infrastructure: Our hostel infrastructure is very impressive. As this is a recently constructed college, we have an advanced hostel with spacious rooms and wide corridors. We also have a good playground and shuttle courts in the hostel. The food in the hostel is comparatively good.

individual_reviews.course: BVSc in Animal Husbandry - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: I'm completely okay with the college, and it's a decent platform for the upcoming future doctors.

content.Placements: There will be 70% of students placed every year in the BVSc & AH course. The highest average package ranges from 8 Lacs per annum to 9.75 Lacs per annum, and the lowest average package ranges from 2.8 Lacs per annum to 6 Lacs per annum. The top recruiting companies in this field are The Indian Veterinary Research Institute, PETA India, Terzetto Pharma Metrics, Amul Dairy, etc. The percentage of students who get internships in the Bachelor of Veterinary Science and Animal Husbandry (BVSc & AH) course varies by college and programme. There are many roles offered in this course like surgeon, breeder, and researcher.

individual_reviews.course: BVSc in Animal Husbandry - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: BVSC aims to save the animal life.

content.Placements: The percentage of placed students in the course is less than 50%. The highest package in the course is 150,000 thousand rupees, and top colleges are Sri Venkateswara Veterinary University. Most of the members will join internships, and other states also offer top roles in internships.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of available Wi-Fi is good and possible to use very nicely. Also, unlimited network will be available. Mostly, labs are very clean and nice, with practicals going on daily. The most important thing is that classrooms are too good, and there is also a library available for new things.

individual_reviews.course: BVSc in Animal Husbandry - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Very good college for those who are determined to be a veterinary doctor.

content.Placements: The placements depend on your GPA at the end of the academic course. Also, the placements in the veterinary department are decided by the government itself. If the government releases any posts, then only you could apply for them and would get a job based on your merit in the college. The highest salary for a beginner would be 30k, and that's an average salary pack too. The internship is offered by the college itself for a span of 6 to 8 months, and it's mandatory for every passed-out student.
content.Infrastructure: The classrooms are pretty clean and tidy. Each class has a green board along with a projector for smart classes, with a Wi-Fi connection separately for each class and lab. The library is composed of thousands of books regarding this course and also general knowledge too. The labs are well-equipped to assist students in learning quickly. Although the college is good, you can't expect much from a government hostel. Rooms might be clean, but the food isn't up to the mark. Daily cleaning would be there for the rooms, and there would be enough space for 3 persons to share.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma In Animal Husbandry - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: College was totally extraordinary.

content.Placements: We are 60 students, among them some are day scholars, and most of us are hostellers. In 2023,15 students got into the Animal Husbandry Assistant job.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel was so good. The food menu was also so good. Nutritious food was provided. The classrooms were so good. The infrastructure was also so nice. The campus was so huge. It was so peaceful. Beside the campus, there is a mountain. It was so nice. Peaceful campus it was.
content.Faculty: The faculty members were very skilled and they taught very well. The exams were conducted very strictly. The pass percentage for 2 years was 98 percent. The semester exams were very critical. Faculty had supported every student in thick and thin.

admission_overview.college_name: SVVU Course Admissions 2025: Eligibility, Fee, Application Process, Scholarship

admission_process.title: SVVU Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Sri Venkateswara Veterinary University(SVVU) admission is open.SVVUis an AICTE approved University. It offers undergraduate, postgraduate, PhD, and Diploma courses inVeterinary Science.
Sri Venkateswara Veterinary Universityoffers 9 programmes in the fields of Veterinary Science and Technology. The university provides these courses full time. Check out the table for more clarity:

Sri Venkateswara Veterinary University course admissionaccepts students based on a valid score in theAP Engineering Agricultural and Medical Common Entrance Test.Students can pursue courses such as BSVC, BTech, MTech, etc at the university. The university also offers Diploma courses and admissions are merit-based. The ICAR AIEEA score are also accepted. Check out the following table to learn more aboutSVVU courses:
Course Name
Eligibility
Selection Criteria
Class 12 with a minimum aggregate of 50% withBiology, Physics,Chemistryand English subjects from a recognised board
Class 12 with Biology,Physics, Chemistry andEnglishsubjects from a recognised board
AP EAMCET| ICAR AIEEA
Graduation in a relevant subject with a minimum aggregate of 60% from a recognised university
Graduation in a relevant subject with a minimum aggregate of 60% from a recognised university
Graduation in a relevant subject with a minimum aggregate of 50% from a recognised university

Sri Venkateswara Veterinary University feeincludes tuition fees, library fees, laboratory fees, hostel fees, medical insurance, and other security deposits,etc. It can be paid annually or semester-wise. Students can check out the following table to learn more about theSVVU course fee:

The SVVU admission processhas steps such as such as application, selection, and admission confirmation. Admission for the courses at UG, PG and research level is entrance-based.  These are followed by a Personal Interview. Follow theSri Venkateswara Vetnirary University admission process:
Application Process
Students with a valid score can visit the official website of the university and apply.
Selection Process
Seats are reserved for those falling under the VCI and those from the families of farmers.
Admission Confirmation
The shortlisted candidates need to go through document verification. Pay the admission fee to confirm their admission at SVVU.

courses_data.description: Sri Venkateswara Veterinary University (SVVU) offers a full-timeBTech in Dairy Technologythrough the College of Dairy Technology, Tirupati. The duration of the UG-level programme is four years.SVVU BTech admissionis based on marks obtained by the candidates in EMACET. Before applying for admission, aspirants must ensure they fulfil theSVVU Tirupati BTech eligibility criteria. The eligibility criteria require applicants to have passed Class 12 from a recognised board with at least 50% aggregate in relevant science subjects. A relaxation of 5% in the minimum aggregate requirement is provided to SC & ST candidates. Find below a few more highlights for theBTechcourse offered at the university:

faqs.question: What are the application fees for the general category for ICAR AIEEA PG registration?
faqs.answer: After filling the form, applicants are required to pay the application fee of their respective category. The general category applicants need to pay INR 1175.The category-wise bifurcation is mentioned in the table below:CategoryApplication FeesGeneral/Unreserved1175Other Backward Classes (OBC)- (NCL)/ EWS1150SC/ST/PwBD/Third Gender600

faqs.question: How can I increase the chances of qualifying ICAR AIEEA PG exam?
faqs.answer: There are various strategies which can increase the chances of qualifying. One of the most remarkable practice which produces good result is solve previous yearICAR AIEEA PG question paperIt will help students to compose their strategy of question solving in less time and help to understand the trend of the questions. Since the syllabus remains same so some times even same questions are repeated in the exam which helps students to take an edge over others.

faqs.question: What are the minimum marks required to get a seat at Sri Venkateswara Veterinary University?
faqs.answer: The minimum marks required to get a seat at Sri Venkateshwara veterinary university is 50% in their subjects. A student under general category to get the seat to the BVSc & AH degree course must have passed in each of the subjects of English, Physics, Chemistry and Biology and at least obtained 50% marks in aggregate of these subjects to qualify the examination.

placement_report.college_name: SVVU Placement & Salary Insights

placement_data.title: SVVU Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: According to the NIRF report 2024 available on the official website of Sri Venkateswara Veterinary University, the median package offered during UG 4-year and UG 5-year placements 2023 stood at INR 8 LPA and INR 8.75 LPA , respectively. Further, the median package offered during SVVU PG 2-year placements 2023 stood at INR 9.75 LPA .

data: SVVU Placement 2023 Increase of nearly 7% was witnessed in the UG 4-year median package offered in 2023 as compared with 2022 Increase of nearly 3% was witnessed in the UG 5-year median package offered in 2023 as compared with 2022 Increase of nearly 3% was witnessed in the PG 2-year median package offered in 2023 as compared with 2022

tables.context: What are the career prospects of pursuing Bachelor

faqs.question: What are the career prospects of pursuing Bachelor of Veterinary Science from SVVU Tirupati?
faqs.answer: SVVU Tirupati BVSc & AH graduates have a wide range of career paths to choose from, including clinical practice, research, academia, public health, animal welfare, and more. They can work in private practices, animal hospitals, research institutions, zoos, government agencies, etc. Some common job profiles for BVSc graduates of the univeristy are tabulated below: BVSc Jobs BVSc Salary Veterinarians INR 5.5 LPA Research Scientists INR 9.2 LPA Academician/Professors INR 13 LPA Animal Welfare Officers INR 4.6 LPA Zoo Veterinarians INR 5.4 LPA Note: The average salary has been taken from Ambitionbox.com.

faqs.question: What are the career prospects of pursuing Master of Veterinary Science from SVVU Tirupati?
faqs.answer: Pursuing an MVSc at SVVU Tirupati has great scope in the diverse field of Veterinary Science. Postgraduates can find an opportunity to work in both public as well as private sectors.They can work in various sectors, such as teaching, clinical practice, research, etc. Some job roles that they can take up are listed below: Animal Physiologist Veterinarian Animal Surgeon Veterinary Epidemiologist Veterinary Dentist

college_info.college_name: SVVU Scholarship Details

paragraphs: Yes, Sri Venkateswara Veterinary University does offer scholarships to eligible students. The scheme is initiated by the state government. Under this scheme, a scholarship of INR 962 per month to the BC and INR 1,200 per month to the SC and ST students is offered. The tuition and special fee of all eligible students, including economically backward and minority students is also reimbursed under this scheme.

Sri Venkateswara Veterinary University (SVVU) expenses a primary-yr fee of INR 27,405 for its Master of Technology (M.Tech) application. This two-year path is designed to offer specialised know-how in regions which include aquaculture and fish processing generation. SVVU, a prominent organization, is well-appeared for its cognizance on veterinary and fisheries sciences, presenting a whole lot of guides to satisfy the diverse hobbies of students.

SVVU offers a four-year BTech in Dairy Technology. The SVVU Tirupati BTech tuition fee is INR 40,000 for the entire duration. Besides the tuition fee, candidates are required to submit one-time fees, which include Admission fee, Students welfare fund, Students Blazars, Identity card, etc. It must be noted that the mentioned fee information is sourced from the official website of the university/sanctioning body. It is still subject to change and hence, is indicative.

reviews_list.review_title: Review of Sri Ramakrishna Institute of Paramedical Sciences.

review_content.Placements: Our batch members are like regular batch students, and the course is very tough compared to other courses. At a minimum, 75% to 90% of the students were placed in our college. The highest salary offered is 1.4 lac per month, and the lowest salary package offered is Rs. 47,000 per month. Almost 80% of the students got internships from the course in our college hospital itself. Roles offered are a technical officer in laboratories, chemical designer, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities like labs are very good and in progress, but classrooms are not available for us till now. The library is available from a good learning perspective. Wi-Fi is not available. The hostel is too bad in condition, and the food quality is very poor. Medical facilities are good, but there are no sports and games in the hostel because there is no ground in college and hostel.

individual_reviews.title: It's all in our hands, we can make it beautiful .

paragraphs: Sri Ramakrishna Institute of Paramedical Sciences admissionis through qualifying exam scores of the candidates. The institute offers courses at UG, PG and Doctorate levels in streams includingMedicine and Health Sciences and Nursing.Sri Ramakrishna Institute of Paramedical Sciencesadmission is granted based on performance of the aspirants in exams, such asCBSE 12th and Tamilnadu 12th. Candidates must register online on the institute’s website. For the offline availability of the application form, students must check with the college admission department.
Candidates have to pay a total tuition fee ofINR 1,50,000 - 10,20,000for UG, PG and Doctorate level. Besides tuition fee, students also need to pay caution deposit, exam fee, hostel fee, etc.
Typically, the duration of the UG level courses ranges between 2 years - 4 years.

The total course fee for the two year programme is INR 8.40 lakh. ADBU also offers MBA in Aviation Technology and candidates are admitted based on their CAT and MAT scores.
faqs.question: What is the course fee for MBA at ADBU?

faqs.answer: A:    The application fee for MBA at Don Bosco University in Assam is Rs. 600. You can visit the MBA program or admission page on the official website of Assam Don Bosco University. You can research the application process. The application price should be found on the official website. The university transcript can be downloaded. The letter usually includes information about admission procedures, fees, and so on. The cover letter should include application information. The total cost of the Assam Don Bosco University program is Rs 3,60,000. Total tuition is subject to change each year based on a number of variables including specialization chosen and co-payments.
faqs.question: What is the application fee for the MBA programme at Assam Don Bosco University?

faqs.answer: A:    Assam Don Bosco offers fee refunds under certain conditions. However, the details vary from case to case. If you withdraw your application and apply for a fee refund before the commencement of the academic year, you can get a partial refund after deducting Rs.1000 as an administrative charge. If you fail to meet the eligibility criteria for admission by 31st October of the year in which you applied, you will get a partial refund, after deducting a pro rated amount of tuition fees and annual fees along with the administrative charge. Once the academic year begins, you will not be able to apply for fee refunds. The detailed refund policy for different scenarios can be found on the university’s website.
faqs.question: Does Assam Don Bosco University refund fees?

faqs.answer: A:    Don Bosco University admissions are based on scores obtained from various entrance exams. The entrance exams accepted for B.Tech are the JEE Main and the DBU-GET. Most other UG programs do not require an entrance exam, but candidates must meet the minimum eligibility requirements for each program. MBA candidates are required to take any of the entrance exams such as CAT, MAT, CMAT, JMAT, XAT, GMAT and DBU-PGET. M.Tech candidates do not need to take an entrance exam for admission to the M.Tech program, but they must have a minimum 60% marks in the qualifying UG degree with a good academic record.
faqs.question: What entrance exam scores are accepted by Assam Don Bosco University for admission?

reviews_list.review_title: Review of Assam Don Bosco University, Azara.

review_content.Placements: There are many placement opportunities as well as internship programs in the college. Even this year, a good number of students got placements after their internships, about 30%. The companies usually belong to the banking and marketing sectors, and the salaries offered range from Rs.20,000 to Rs.40,000, which is quite enough for an entry-level job, especially in the northeast regions.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities offered in the college are quite satisfactory and resourceful. Most classrooms are fitted with smart boards and Wi-Fi connections, which make learning very interactive and interesting. The library is also full of quality books and has the space necessary for studying. There is also an infirmary and three canteens having a variety of food items.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Overall review for Assam Don Bosco University Azara campus for BBA students.

review_content.Placements: As I am pursuing BBA at Assam Don Bosco University Azara, here the average package for BBA students is around Rs 2 to 3 Lacs per annum and the top recruiters are TCS, Infosys, HCL Infosystems, The Adecco Group, BSNL, Reliance Communications, HDFC Bank, ICICI Bank, Microsoft, Wipro, SpiceJet, Shriram Value Services.
review_content.Infrastructure: As I am currently studying at Azara campus, here the college infrastructure is average. The campus is very small, non-air-conditioned classrooms, sports facilities are not also good, but some of the factors such as the library, classroom seats, and digital classrooms are really impressive. If we talk about hostel infrastructure, it is very disappointing. Around 60-70% of first-year students leave the hostel after the first year, the reason being hostel strictness. If you are an outgoing person, just want to inform you that hostel gates are closed after 6 pm. If we talk about food, they provide veg and non-veg options, but the quantity is very less. The water facility is not really good, and toilets are not clean.

faqs.answer: Yes, BCom (Hons) is available at Assam Don Bosco University as an undergraduate degree programme of four years. However, the university offers opportunities for acquiring Certifications from ACCA (Association of Chartered Certified Accountants), CFA (Chartered Financial Analyst Certification), and CIPM (Certificate in Investment of Performance Measurement). faqs.question: Q: Is BCom (Hons) available at Assam Don Bosco University?

faqs.answer: To secure admission at Assam Don Bosco University for BCom (Hons), candidates must start by applying for the programme. They must fill out the detailed application form and submit it along with an application fee of INR 600. After completing the application process, aspirants must wait for an admission offer letter issued by the university to shortlist candidates. The university prepares a list of the students based on the eligibility criteria and seat availability for BCom (Hons) in the university. The selected candidates should be admitted by paying an admission fee.
faqs.question: Q: How can I get into BCom (Hons) at Assam Don Bosco University?

faqs.answer: Yes, there is a semester pattern that prevails in the case of BCom at Assam Don Bosco University. This undergraduate programme is subdivided into two semesters each academic year. However, each semester usually lasts around 18 weeks so that learning is systematic. It is an undergraduate programme pursued for four years consisting of eight semesters. The university provides BCom (Hons) as a full-time programme. Below is the first semester BCom (Hons) syllabus.Environmental StudiesFinancial AccountingGeneral Elective -I (Anyone)Micro EconomicsInsurance and Risk ManagementPrinciples of ManagementCorporate Reporting (ACCA)

faqs.answer: Yes, you can get direct admission in Don Bosco University, Assam. by the following steps-1) Those who do not appear for the JEE Mains or State Entrance tests, must appear for the Don Bosco University Graduate Entrance Test (DBU-GET). 2)The DBU-GET for B.Tech. will examine the candidates on their proficiency in Physics, Chemistry and Mathematics at class XII level. the duration of the entrance test is 3 hours. you need at least 50% of aggregate marks in PCM or PCB from recognised booard with accredited institution.3)B.Tech. tests will be conducted online, the date and time will be informed through e-mail and phone personally.

review_summary.college_name: Assam Don Bosco University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Chemistry - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: The campus is beautiful, and the food in each canteen is very clean and hygienic.

content.Placements: Since the Chemistry department encourages students to pursue their careers in research, there are limited placements. Only teaching-related recruiters come to the college and offer an average salary of 4 LPA. This year, recruiters like Avanti Group, Azim Premji Foundation, and some local colleges came.
content.Infrastructure: Fans, bunk beds, and cupboards are provided in excellent condition, with two plug sockets for every student. Food is not provided in the hostel, one must buy from canteens and eat, but it's very affordable. The process for registration of the hostel starts during the time of admission. To book a slot, we paid 1000. The hostel is quite affordable at 15,000 per semester, which is like 2,500 per month. I have not rented a PG, but my friends have in the Sonapur or Kamerkuchi locality.

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Chemistry - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: The campus is very beautiful, plus the food in each canteen is very clean and hygienic.

content.Placements: I am in my first year here, so opportunities for me were not quite many. Seniors got opportunities from companies like Amazon, Google, Microsoft, TATA, Wadhwani Foundation, Internshala, etc. There were opportunities often. One can prepare for competitive exams well.
content.Infrastructure: There were usually 3 fests every month, held by various departments, which include food fest, music fest, Mental health conferences, cultural fest, etc. The library was stacked with various books and journals. Novels by famous as well as underrated authors, Research papers, Theses, Self help books, etc. There were projectors in every classroom, labs, and proper facilities available for B.Sc. students, computer rooms, photography room, journalism room, editorial room, etc.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Commerce (M.Com) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: My experience in university is good but dissatisfied with the campus

content.Placements: Placement is not taken important in our university. There is placement staff who invites the recruiter for interview so one who are interested go for the interview. Since I didn't go for interview I don't know the highest or lowest package offered in our course.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities are average. There is wifi but I can say it's useless. Labs are good and classrooms are also good there is single seats available for all the students. Hostel is also there for both boys and girls I don't know about the mess and all. 2 canteens are there in campus. Sports and games are good.

admission_overview.title: Assam Don Bosco University Admission Overview 2025
admission_overview.description: Assam Don Bosco University admission process 2025 is based on both entrance exam and merit for UG and PG courses. ADBU admissions are opne now, and interested candidates can apply online on the official website of the university. ADBU - Assam Don Bosco University, the only university in private sector with NAAC 'A' Grade in Assam, offers a wide range of programmes at UG, PG, doctoral, and diploma level including BTech, BSc, BCom, MBA, MTech, MSW etc. Admission to BTech and MBA programmes is done on the basis of entrance tests JEE Mains/ Advanced, and MAT/ CAT, respectively.

eligibility_selection.title: Assam Don Bosco University Eligibility & Selection Criteria 2025

The DBU-GET for BTech programme will evaluate the candidates on their proficiency in Physics, Chemistry and Mathematics at the Class 12 level. The duration of the Entrance Test is three hours. Below are the Assam Don Bosco University eligibility and selection criteria details for UG & PG courses:

admission_process.title: Assam Don Bosco University Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Assam Don Bosco University is open for admission now. Candidates can apply online and pay the application fee. Once the candidates make a payment for application fee, the Admission Office will schedule an entrance test/ interview for them, and the details will be informed to them personally.
Below is the step-by-step process for Assam Don Bosco University admission:
Step 1: ADBU Application
Candidates must apply online through the official website of Assam Don Bosco University @dbuniversity.ac.in
Step 2: ADBU Selection Process
Entrance Test (DBU) and Personal Interview will be conducted on the same day.
Step 3: ADBU Documents Submission
Candidates must submit the following documents at the time of admission,
Step 4: ADBU Admission Fees Payment

Candidates who are qualified for admission are to pay the admission fees (non-refundable) before 5:00 pm on the day of admission. The balance fees payable are to be paid within 7 days. The payment may be made via PayTM / GooglePay / BHIM or online at the admission portal of the university/ a NEFT to the university account(Axis Bank,Khanapara, Assam Don Bosco University A/C Don Bosco Society).
Please note that no fees will be accepted in cash or cheque.

Assam Don Bosco University fee includes many components, such astuition fee, hostel fee, library deposit,training and placement fee, etc. Coming to affordability, it is one of the reasons why many leave a degree or a college. While availability of education loans and scholarships have made education accessible but the terms and conditions required to become eligible for a student loan or a scholarship often stand as a challenge.

faqs.question: What is the application fee for the MBA programme at Assam Don Bosco University?
faqs.answer: The application fee for MBA at Don Bosco University in Assam is Rs. 600. You can visit the MBA program or admission page on the official website of Assam Don Bosco University. You can research the application process. The application price should be found on the official website. The university transcript can be downloaded. The letter usually includes information about admission procedures, fees, and so on. The cover letter should include application information. The total cost of the Assam Don Bosco University program is Rs 3,60,000. Total tuition is subject to change each year based on a number of variables including specialization chosen and co-payments.

faqs.question: Is MAT enough for Assam Don Bosco University, MBA admissions?
faqs.answer: Your MAT score is acceptable for ADBU’s MBA admission. Examinations occurring in the entrance examination, including the MAT, are recognized by the ADBU. To be considered for admission however you must meet the prerequisites for a degree in any subject with a minimum of 50% possible marks and a valid MAT score You will need a specific MAT score depending on the level of competition the year you apply. The cutoff score for the shortlisted candidates for the next round of selection is determined by the ADBU based on a number of factors including candidates’ size, academic qualifications and MAT scores.

faqs.question: Which entrance exam scores does Assam Don Bosco University accept for admission to MBA ?
faqs.answer: Assam Don Bosco University accepts the following entrance exam scores for admission to MBA :1.Don Bosco University Entrance Test (DBU-PGET)2. Common Admission Test (CAT)3.Graduate Management Admission Test (GMAT)4.Xavier Aptitude Test (XAT)5.Management Aptitude Test (MAT)6.Joint Management Entrance Test (JMAT)7.All India Council for Technical Education8. Common Management Admission Test (AICTE-CMAT)Candidates with valid GMAT/ CAT/XAT/MAT /AICTE-CMAT/JMAT scores may be exempted from the written test . The selection process also includes a group discussion and personal interview

placement_data.title: Assam Don Bosco University (ADBU) Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: The Assam Don Bosco University placement team is always working hard to find and create job opportunities for students. They collaborate closely with the students, who are a key part of the team, to make sure the students gain the best exposure to the corporate world. The University is yet to release its placement report for 2025 however, the NIRF Report for 2025 has been released. In all 208 students scured placements during Assam Don Bosco University placements. Out of these 208 students, a total of 42 UG 3-year students scured placements with a highest package of INR 3.41 LPA .When compared with last year, the median package has increased from INR 1.92 LPA to INR 3.41 LPA, presenting an increase of 77.60%. The median packages for UG 4-year and PG 2-year stood at INR 3.68 LPA and INR 2.76 LPA, respectively.

faqs.question: Does Assam Don Bosco University have good placements?
faqs.answer: Assam Don Bosco Uiversity does not boast top placement records but it offers a decent placements for its students. Around 4.5 LPA was the average compensation package that was given out last year. According to ADBU, businesses that come to their campus for placements include Amazon, IBM, Wipro, HDFC Bank, ITC, Microsoft, Vodafone, and others. Students can get help with resume building, interview preparation, and networking with businesses through the university's active placement cell. ADBU offers fair placement opportunities in its key subjects; nonetheless, when compared to elite colleges, the average package values may not be the highest.

faqs.question: Does Assam Don Bosco University refund fees?
faqs.answer: Assam Don Bosco offers fee refunds under certain conditions. However, the details vary from case to case. If you withdraw your application and apply for a fee refund before the commencement of the academic year, you can get a partial refund after deducting Rs.1000 as an administrative charge. If you fail to meet the eligibility criteria for admission by 31st October of the year in which you applied, you will get a partial refund, after deducting a pro rated amount of tuition fees and annual fees along with the administrative charge. Once the academic year begins, you will not be able to apply for fee refunds. The detailed refund policy for different scenarios can be found on the university’s website.

hostel_campus.college_name: Assam Don Bosco University Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description:
The University offers separate hostel accommodation for boys and girls. The boy's hostel named as Carreno Hall managed and run exclusively for DBCET students by Don Bosco Society, Azara. The girl's hostel is managed and runs exclusively for DBCET students by Ferrando Developmental Educational Welfare Society. 

These hostels offer a number of facilities for students such as:
Well-furnished rooms with wifi enabled
High-speed Internet and Intranet services
Safe drinking water
Round the clock security
Television in common room
Hygienically prepared vegetarian and non-vegetarian food

library.description: The Library with its modern collection of knowledge resources and innovative information services provides necessary supports for teaching, learning, research activities of the University by creating state-of-the-art facilities to the academic community. The entire Library collections are made available through OPAC. The Library is now partially automated using Koha ILMS for running its housekeeping operation which is an integrated system connected to all the three campuses i.e, Azara, Tapesia & Kharguli campus network, providing online access to catalog & e-resource facility. The Library offers a range of information services to support the learning process set to the highest professional standards.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Table Tennis

cafeteria.description: At the Assam Don Bosco University, we have several canteens and cafeterias that address the need of our students to assimilate, interact, socialize, and familiarize themselves with life on campus. In addition to serving as a meeting ground for students, the cafeterias at the Assam Don Bosco University serve hot, nutritious and tasty food items to cater to a wide variety of palates.

The University offers separate hostel accommodation for boys and girls. The boy's hostel named as Carreno Hall managed and run exclusively for DBCET students by Don Bosco Society, Azara. The girl's hostel is managed and runs exclusively for DBCET students by Ferrando Developmental Educational Welfare Society.

labs.description: Available Facilities: Civil Engineering Lab, Chemistry Lab, Computer Lab, Electrical Lab, Electronics Lab, Language Lab, Mechanical Lab, Physics Lab, Fabrication Lab

reviews.review_heading: The campus is beautiful, and the food in each canteen is very clean and hygienic.
reviews.review_text: Fans, bunk beds, and cupboards are provided in excellent condition, with two plug sockets for every student. Food is not provided in the hostel, one must buy from canteens and eat, but it's very affordable. The process for registration of the hostel starts during the time of admission. To book a slot, we paid 1000. The hostel is quite affordable at 15,000 per semester, which is like 2,500 per month. I have not rented a PG, but my friends have in the Sonapur or Kamerkuchi locality.

reviews.review_heading: The campus is very beautiful, plus the food in each canteen is very clean and hygienic.
reviews.review_text: There were usually 3 fests every month, held by various departments, which include food fest, music fest, Mental health conferences, cultural fest, etc. The library was stacked with various books and journals. Novels by famous as well as underrated authors, Research papers, Theses, Self help books, etc. There were projectors in every classroom, labs, and proper facilities available for B.Sc. students, computer rooms, photography room, journalism room, editorial room, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Assam Don Bosco University, Azara.
reviews.review_text: Facilities offered in the college are quite satisfactory and resourceful. Most classrooms are fitted with smart boards and Wi-Fi connections, which make learning very interactive and interesting. The library is also full of quality books and has the space necessary for studying. There is also an infirmary and three canteens having a variety of food items.

reviews.review_heading: Overall review for Assam Don Bosco University Azara campus for BBA students.
reviews.review_text: As I am currently studying at Azara campus, here the college infrastructure is average. The campus is very small, non-air-conditioned classrooms, sports facilities are not also good, but some of the factors such as the library, classroom seats, and digital classrooms are really impressive. If we talk about hostel infrastructure, it is very disappointing. Around 60-70% of first-year students leave the hostel after the first year, the reason being hostel strictness. If you are an outgoing person, ...

reviews.review_heading: My experience in university is good but dissatisfied with the campus
reviews.review_text: The facilities are average. There is wifi but I can say it's useless. Labs are good and classrooms are also  good there is single seats available for all the students. Hostel is also there for both boys and girls I don't know about the mess and all. 2 canteens are there in campus. Sports and games are good.

reviews.review_heading: I also like the simplicity of the campus and easy access to the library.
reviews.review_text: In one room, 4 people have to stay. The room is small, though the placement of your property (bed, cupboard, table) is arranged in such a way that you don't feel occupied by them. They provide shower-type, basin-type bathrooms. And for the food, they don't have a kitchen in hostels. But they have canteens near every hostel block. So no pre-payment of foods; you will have to buy the food at the moment and eat. But nothing to be worried about the prices. It's affordable. For thalis, they range 50-...

reviews.review_heading: The college environment is very good, nice, and clean.
reviews.review_text: My overall experience in the college is very nice. I love being a part of this college experience. Many kinds of programs are held on our college campus, like DBIM fest, etc. There are plenty of books and journals in the college library, and the classes are fully equipped with smart boards.

reviews.review_heading: College atmosphere is well and good.
reviews.review_text: Hostel facilities were amazing, and the cost was also affordable. Even though there were no food facilities in the hostels, we had four canteens inside the campus, which were cheap and the food was also tasty. Hostel wardens were very caring and sincere, and in case of any medical emergency, they were always there. There were different clubs as well, for example, music, dance, art & craft, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Review of M.Sc.  Zoology at Assam don bosco university.
reviews.review_text: Awesome Don Bosco University provides grade infrastructure for the student of M.Sc.  Zoology as they provides online library services We need clean classrooms which are fully ventilated and air-conditioned. hostel facility is also there, and queer students got five-time food, 24/7 Wi-Fi and electricity services. They also integrated medical insurance.

reviews.review_heading: Assam Don Bosco University Provides Excellent Facilities in the M.A. English Course
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is excellent and attractive, featuring well-maintained classrooms, fully equipped labs and online library facilities. They also provide hostel facilities with five meals a day, prioritizing student safety.

reviews.review_heading: My experience in Assam Don Bosco University.
reviews.review_text: The facilities provided by the university are average. We get Wi-Fi, whose speed is around 30 Mbps, with around 10 computer labs and specific rooms for the engineering students. There is a library, which is the best infrastructure that is provided, as many kinds of books can be found in it. There are four floors of classrooms and each specific department has its own staff rooms and toilets. The hostel provides a fairly good infrastructure, and I will agree that the environment around it is very ...

reviews.review_heading: Good facilities are provided by the college.
reviews.review_text: Rooms are pretty large and so we have 4 members in each room, fully furnished rooms with 4 fans one for each one of us. The study table is attached to the bed plus 1 drawer, 2 slots below it, and a cupboard with 3 slots. Currently, we have 3 canteens as the college is very large each near hostels, the canteen provides 3-time meals and you have to buy a couple each time you eat, there are different departments selling Indian, Chinese, Tribal food and many more. So the food money is not included i...

reviews.review_heading: Faculty members were amicable in nature.
reviews.review_text: Hostel facilities are excellent and spacious, with reasonable rent, providing a clean and conducive environment for studying. The food is also good, resembling a home-cooked meal. The average cost for both UG and PG students is 27,000 for 6 months. The hostel is located within the campus, allowing parents to visit their children anytime. External expenses range from Rs. 2000 to Rs. 4000.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty members were very friendly in nature.
reviews.review_text: Our rooms are quite large, accommodating 4 members in each room. They are fully furnished with 4 fans, one for each occupant. The room includes a study table attached to the bed, with 1 drawer, 2 slots below it, and a cupboard with 3 slots. Currently, there are 3 canteens in the college, each situated near hostels. The canteen provides three meals a day, and you have to buy a coupon each time you eat. Different departments sell Indian, Chinese, Tribal food, and more. The food expenses are not in...

paragraphs: Assam Don Bosco University offers BPharm at the UG level. The BPharm fee structure comprises various fee components, such as tuition fees, hostel fees, admission fees, etc. The following table presents the total ADBU BPharm fees:
Note: The mentioned fee is sourced from the official website of the university. It is still subject to change and, hence, is indicative.

Candidates seeking admission to Assam Don Bosco University BPharm and applying for admission through the online mode must check all details filled in and proceed with the payment. They must pay an ADBU BPharm application fee of INR 600. The application fees can be paid online through Credit/ Debit Cards, Net Banking, UPI, and other digital payment methods. However, the above mentioned fee is taken from the official website/sanctioning body. It is still subject to change and, hence, is indicative

Yes, Assam Don Bosco University offers scholarships of up to INR 2.10 lakh to the students enrolled in its BCom (Hons) course. The university offers various tuition fee waiver schemes and scholarship schemes to encourage meritorious students to avail of the excellent academic ambience. The available scholarships at ADBU are listed below:

Assam Don Bosco University offers a two-year MBA programme and candidates who have cleared the admission process for the course are eligible to pay the course fee. The course fee for MBA at Assam Don Bosco University is INR 4.20 Lacs per annum. The total course fee for the two year programme is INR 8.40 lakh. ADBU also offers MBA in Aviation Technology and candidates are admitted based on their CAT and MAT scores.

college_info.intro:
The flagship programme offered at SNS College of Allied Health Science is BSc. This course is offered across specialisations, including Operation Theatre and Anaesthesia Technology, Cardiac Technology, Radiography and Imaging Technology and Cardio Pulmonary Perfusion Care Technology, among others.
For BSc admission, students must have passed Class 12 with Physics, Chemistry and Biology or Botany or Zoology and English with at least 45% aggregate (35% aggregate for SC/ ST candidates). Students can check the popular programmes offered at SNS College of Allied Health Science in the table provided below:

faqs.question: What is the eligibility for BSc at SNS College of Allied and Health Sciences?
faqs.answer: Candidates who have passed Class 12 with Physics, Chemistry and Biology or Botany or Zoology and English with at least 45% aggregate (35% aggregate for SC/ ST candidates) are eligible to apply for SNS College of Allied and Health Sciences BSc programme.Every aspirant before admission to the course need to submit to the Principal of the institution a certificate of medical fitness from an authorised medical officer that the candidate is physically fit to undergo the academic course.

faqs.question: Which are the BSc specialisations offered at SNS College of Allied and Health Sciences?

faqs.question: Is there any age limit to apply for BSc at SNS College of Allied and Health Sciences?
faqs.answer: Yes, a candidate should have complete the age of 17 years at the time of admission to apply for BSc course at SNS College of Allied and Health Sciences. Aspirants who would complete the said age on or before December 31 of the year of admission can also apply for the BSc programme.

faqs.question: Is entrance exam required for admission at SNS College of Allied and Health Sciences?
faqs.answer: SNS College of Allied and Health Sciences considers CET or NEET score for admission to BSc programme. However, it is not mandatory have to entrance exam score for admission. Aspirants fulfiling the eligibility criteria can also get admission based on their Class 12 score. Aspirants need to complete Class 12 with relevant subjects with at least 45% aggregate to apply for admission.

faqs.question: Can I apply at SNS College of Allied and Health Sciences with 60% in Class 12?
faqs.answer: Candidates need to complete Class 12 with Physics, Chemistry and Biology or Botany or Zoology and English with at least 45% aggregate to apply at SNS College of Allied and Health Sciences. Hence, candidates with 60% in Class 12 can apply for admission. There is a relaxation of 5% in the aggregate for SC/ ST candidates.

faqs.question: How can I get a seat in SNS College of Allied and Health Sciences?
faqs.answer: SNS College of Allied and Health Sciences considers the scores of the candidates in the last qualifying exam for admission. Candidates with a valid CET or NEET score can also get admission. However, it is not mandatory to have a valid entrance exam score. Once selected, aspirants are further called for document verification. Candidates need to pay the course fee to confirm their seat in the college.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission at SNS College of Allied and Health Sciences?
faqs.answer: Admission to SNS College of Allied and Health Sciences is merit-based. The college considers Class 12 scores of the candidates for admission. However, aspirants with CET or NEET score can also apply for admission at SNS BSc programme. Once the selection process is over, candidates are further called for document verification and fee payment.

college_info.intro:
Woxsen University Hyderabad has 7 constituent schools. Some of the schools of study are the Woxsen School of Business, Woxsen School of Technology, & Woxsen School of Art and Design, etc. Woxsen University Telangana schools has a wide range of programmes at the UG, PG, PhD, & executive levels. Woxsen University courses are offered across many streams like Management, Arts and Design, Law, Technology, & Sciences. MBA/PGDM is the most popular course among the students going for admissions followed by BTech & Bachelor of Design (BDes). Woxsen University is known as the Top MBA University Hyderabad. These students get good placements in good organisations. The highest & average packages offered during Woxsen University BTech placements for the year 2025 were INR 24 LPA and 9.50 LPA. For the MBA course, the highest and average packages offered to the MBA batch 2025 stood at INR 19 LPA and INR 9.10 LPA. respectively.
Woxsen University Hyderabad students learn technology education through advanced learning techniques like Industry Exposure, Applied Learning, & International Student Exchange. The university has 24 student clubs, events, competitions, and other facilities available for the development of students.
Check the below video to know more about Woxsen University courses:

review_summary.college_name: Woxsen University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: It offers good campus facilities and supportive faculty members.

content.Placements: I am from the 2028 passing out batch of the B.Tech. My branch is CSE data science. Our course focuses on data science subjects along with industry-oriented training, internships, and technical skills development. Around 85-90 percent of the eligible students from our course got placed through the campus recruitment process. The package offered ranges from 6-7 LPA. Infosys is the top recruiting company for our course. A top role offered is a software engineer.
content.Infrastructure: Our college provides high-speed Wi-Fi, programming and computing labs, projectors, and a smart board. The library has a large collection of textbooks and reference books. Regular housekeeping is done. The mess provides hygienic and balanced meals, with a rotating weekly menu. First-aid services are provided. It has indoor and outdoor games.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Review of Woxsen University.

content.Placements: Placements have been great so far. The highest package is at 24 LPA, the lowest is 7 LPA, and the average is 10 LPA. These are the statistics for the first batch to graduate. They graduated last year, and our 2025 batch is yet to graduate. But their placements are impressive so far, considering they are just the second B.Tech batch to graduate.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is really good. Classrooms are interactive, and each class contains 58 students. The hostel and food are also really good. Sports facilities meet international standards, and the campus is full of hangout spots, especially the library, a student hotspot.

individual_reviews.title: Good and safe environment.

admission_process.title: Woxsen University Admission Process 2026

paragraphs: Woxsen University admissionis a multi-step process. Check below the five simple steps that candidates need to take for Woxsen University course admission:

Candidates need to submit their application form online on the official website of the university before the Woxsen University application last date. The applicant should provide all of the information requested in the application, both in the mandatory and non-mandatory sections.

As per the Woxsen University admission process, candidates will either need to appear for the University-level or the national-level entrance exam. Aspirants must check the entrance exam accepted for the course of their choice. W-JEET and WAT are conducted by the university for admission to specific courses. National-level entrance exams like GMAT, GRE, NMAT, JEE Main, etc., are also accepted.
Candidates shortlisted based on the entrance exam need to come for the personal interview round. The emphasis is on oral communication skills, conduct, confidence, and clarity of expression.

Candidates who meet the Composite Score requirements based on the three steps outlined above will be updated and will receive a provisional offer letter. Candidates will be given seven days to accept or decline the offer.
Check out more aboutWoxsen University Admission Processin the video below:
lists: Woxsen University Application Process
Appear for the Online Entrance Exam
Appear for Personal Interview
Acceptance of the Offer Letter

courses_data.description: At the UG level, Woxsen University offers a three-year BBA (Hons) course. The university also offers a four-year BBA (Hons). Candidates have to qualify for theWAT, and a Personal Interviewround conducted at Woxsen University. Also, the minimum eligibility to apply for this course is to passClass 12in any stream with minimum of 55% aggregate.

faqs.question: Can I join BBA (Hons) at Woxsen University without any entrance exam?
faqs.answer: No, there is no provision of direct admission for BBA (Hons) at Woxsen University. Aspirants have to qualify for either WAT or CUET UG exam with a valid score. The selection criteria for BBA (Hons) at Woxsen University considers entrance exam scores and performance of candidates in Personal Interview round conducted at the university itself. Click here for the detailed Woxsen University BBA (Hons) admission process.

faqs.question: Which entrance exam is accepted for BBA (Hons) in Woxsen University?
faqs.answer: Woxsen University conducts WAT, which is an in-house entrance exam of Woxsen University. WAT is an online 1 hour test of 100 marks comprises questions around Quantitative Aptitude, English, Reasoning, Reading Comprehension, and General Knowledge. There is no negative marking applicable in WAT. Candidates can also apply via a valid score of CUET UG, which is conducted every year by NTA.

faqs.question: Is EAMCET accepted at Woxsen University?
faqs.answer: Yes, Woxsen University accepts EAMCET exam scores for admission to BTech course. Candidates can qualify for this exam to secure a seat to BTech course. Further, the university also accepts valid scores of entrance exams such as VITEEE, MHT CET, W-JEET, etc. Admission to all courses at Woxsen University is entirely based on scores of respective entrance exams.

faqs.question: Who is eligible to apply for BSc (Hons) at Woxsen University?
faqs.answer: BSc (Hons) at Woxsen University is a four-year Hons course. The university admits students to these courses based on their merit in either WAT/SAT/CUET. Moreover, students must have cleared Class 12 from a recognised board of education with a minimum of 60% aggregate.

placement_report.college_name: Woxsen University Placements 2025: Highest Package, Average Package, Top Companies

placement_data.title: Woxsen University Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: Woxsen University has announced its placement statistics for 2025 concerning BBA, MBA, BDes, and BTech programs. The placement cell has successfully offered excellent job opportunities to its students. In the 2025 Woxsen University placement, the MBA , BBA , and BTech courses attained a placement rate of 100% . The BDes department achieved a placement rate of 97% . The highest package offered to the students was INR 19 LPA . The highest and average packages offered to the MBA batch 2025 stood at INR 19 LPA and INR 9.10 LPA . respectively.

The highest and median packages offered to the BTech batch 2025 stood at INR 24 LPA and INR 8.5 LPA . respectively. For BDes batch 2025, the highest and median package offered during Woxsen University placements 2025 stood at INR 12 LPA and INR 6.2 LPA . respectively. The BBA (Hons) batch 2025 achieved the highest package of INR 10 LPA and the median package of INR 7 LPA.

hostel_campus.college_name: Woxsen University Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: Woxsen’s ultra-modern campus sits on a sprawling 200 acre landscape, in a serene and pollution free environment in Hyderabad. Adorned with thoughtfully built indoor & outdoor spaces, the campus has been designed by renowned architects specialized in educational architecture. The living spaces at Woxsen are one of a kind, comparable to any ivy-league institution's student residential facilities. These hostels offer twin sharing and three sharing rooms for boys and girls in separate blocks. The university has a total of 1087 rooms in all the hostel blocks combined. Proper wifi services, water supply, air-conditioned (A/C) & non-air-conditioned rooms, 24/7 security staff, CCTV Surveillance available.

data: Library, Cafeteria, Hostel, Sports Complex, Gym, Shuttle Service, Labs

library.description: Heralding a new generation of self-learning centres in higher education, Woxsen University's brand-new Library and Self-Learning Facility- Vithal Gandhi Centre, provides students access to over 18,000 offline and 33000+ online resources. Built on an expansive 70,000 Sq. Ft., the state-of-the-art facility is perhaps one of the largest in India. The centre offers students, faculty, and staff unhindered access to internationally recognized books, journals, annual reports, market studies, reference titles, magazines, and newspapers. This vast collection covers a broad range of topics in management, design, architecture, technology and more. The library offers 10205 books with 18 Journals, 1500 Online Resources, and 500 Audio-Visual Materials. Subscription for leading Magazines, Newspapers & Journals. ICT based resources such as e-books, e-journals, databases. E-resources including JGate plus, Shodhganga, Shodhgangotri and NDL. Institutional Repository for thesis and dissertations. Automatic Book Circulation Kiosks.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Squash Court, Tennis Court, Golf Course, Box Cricket Arena, Volleyball Court, Kabaddi Court, Croquet, Billiards Lounge, Foosball and Air Hockey, Chess Lounge, Carroms

library.description: Heralding a new generation of self-learning centres in higher education, Woxsen University's brand-new Library and Self-Learning Facility- Vithal Gandhi Centre, provides students access to over 18,000 offline and 33000+ online resources. Built on an expansive 70,000 Sq. Ft., the state-of-the-art facility is perhaps one of the largest in India. The centre offers students, faculty, and staff unhindered access to internationally recognized books, journals, annual reports, market studies, reference titles, magazines, and newspapers. This vast collection covers a broad range of topics in management, design, architecture, technology and more. The library offers 10205 books with 18 Journals, 1500 Online Resources, and 500 Audio-Visual Materials. Subscription for leading Magazines, Newspapers & Journals. ICT based resources such as e-books, e-journals, databases. E-resources including JGate plus, Shodhganga, Shodhgangotri and NDL. Institutional Repository for thesis and dissertations. Automatic Book Circulation Kiosks.

cafeteria.description: Each of the 4 eateries on campus is distinct with menu offerings and ambience, from a sprawling cafeteria to a quaint coffee shop and a multi-cuisine restaurant, Woxsen has it all. To suit the taste pallet and personal choices, both vegetarian and non-vegetarian dishes are provided in the cafeteria. Special dietary requirements of students are also catered to the best of our capabilities provided the institution is informed in advance of the requirements.

hostel.description: Woxsen’s ultra-modern campus sits on a sprawling 200 acre landscape, in a serene and pollution free environment in Hyderabad. Adorned with thoughtfully built indoor & outdoor spaces, the campus has been designed by renowned architects specialized in educational architecture. The living spaces at Woxsen are one of a kind, comparable to any ivy-league institution's student residential facilities. These hostels offer twin sharing and three sharing rooms for boys and girls in separate blocks. The university has a total of 1087 rooms in all the hostel blocks combined. Proper wifi services, water supply, air-conditioned (A/C) & non-air-conditioned rooms, 24/7 security staff, CCTV Surveillance available.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Squash Court, Tennis Court, Golf Course, Box Cricket Arena, Volleyball Court, Kabaddi Court, Croquet, Billiards Lounge, Foosball and Air Hockey, Chess Lounge, Carroms

labs.description: Available Facilities: Chemistry Lab, Computer Lab, Electrical Lab, Physics Lab, AI & Robotics Studio, Analytics & Behavioral Lab, Bloomberg Finance Lab, Digital Design Lab, Robotics Lab, Fashion Design Lab

reviews.review_heading: It offers good campus facilities and supportive faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides high-speed Wi-Fi, programming and computing labs, projectors, and a smart board. The library has a large collection of textbooks and reference books. Regular housekeeping is done. The mess provides hygienic and balanced meals, with a rotating weekly menu. First-aid services are provided. It has indoor and outdoor games.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Woxsen University.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is really good. Classrooms are interactive, and each class contains 58 students. The hostel and food are also really good. Sports facilities meet international standards, and the campus is full of hangout spots, especially the library, a student hotspot.

reviews.review_heading: Good college for teach researchers only
reviews.review_text: Very good infrastructure. Wi-Fi is provided for every room and classroom. The library contains a minimum number of books on the teach field. The teach contains a large number of GPUs for faster processing and running of programs. The mess has very good food.

reviews.review_heading: Campus is peaceful, wonderful, world-class infrastructure, and greenery.
reviews.review_text:
- The whole campus is equipped with Wi-Fi
- 10th the largest Library
- Fully-furnished Classrooms
- Technical advanced Labs
- Good Food
- Spacious Hostel Room (2 per each room & 3 per each room)
- We have a General Store which almost all consists of the things we can buy
- We have a hospital for students
- We have sports arena and fields and Gyms.

reviews.review_heading: Good and safe environment.
reviews.review_text: College has good infrastructure compared to other top-class universities. Good arena for sports to showcase our extracurricular activities. Hostels are so hygienic and clean, and they are so good to stay. Food in the canteen is also good. It's a good and peaceful environment to get a degree.

reviews.review_heading: Woxsen University - great infrastructure but not academics.
reviews.review_text: Woxsen is famous for its infrastructure, I feel it's not less than any foreign universities and 5-star hotels, everything, classrooms and hostels feel so rich. Every room has a separate Wi-Fi router and also has advanced AI and robotics labs. And the library is one of the richest and most attention-seeking on the campus. Food is so good with multiple cuisines, and we also have a separate sports arena with a football and cricket stadium and courts of all sports possible.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied as value for money.
reviews.review_text: We have awesome infrastructure. I would say it is one of the best in southern India. Facilities are tremendously good, including proper Wi-Fi connectivity and clean, distraction-free classrooms. The quality of food in the mess and canteen is very good. We have a buffet system here, which means we can serve ourselves as much as we want. Medical facilities are good too. However, in emergencies, the university takes the patient to the nearest hospital for speed treatment. Sports and games are top-n...

reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure is good, and the quality is good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure-related everything is good. The university provides us with good facilities. Libraries are good and provide good books for every subject, which helps us in our studies.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, a good place to pursue UG programmes of your interest.
reviews.review_text: World-class facilities are provided with very modern infrastructure. The food and quality is just like regular mess and we have 4 dineout spots in the campus which includes 2 cafeterias and 2 restaurants. All labs are equipped with adequate amount of equipment and technician to guide the students. The students are encouraged to learn technical skills by practically applying them in the labs.

reviews.review_heading: Good campus facilities, great infrastructure, great placement, and internships.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is included everywhere, in well-designed labs with full full-proof camera and a great library. Great facilities in a hostel, alternative cleaning days, good quality food, good medical facilities, and great grounds for sports and games, good opportunity for people.

reviews.review_heading: Overall the campus is in development and even the students.
reviews.review_text: The courses are great and no complaints about them. The food and accommodation are okay but for the money we pay here, it must be better than this. Labs are dedicated to each school and the total campus is full of Wi-Fi connectivity. Medical facilities are impressive.

reviews.review_heading: Woxsen is the best choice compared to other top universities in the country.
reviews.review_text: Coming to facilities and Woxsen's infrastructure, I can say they are top-notch, and no one will be disappointed compared to any other college in the country. Coming to food and facilities in the college, Woxsen has very good food and hostel facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Really very good and strict college. I will highly recommend others who play sports.
reviews.review_text: In Woxsen University, the infrastructure is really very nice. Everywhere you can easily get Wi-Fi, and labs are also very advanced. Classes are also really good. Canteens are a very nice place to hang out. Hostels are really hygienic, and the food is too delicious. We have a very big sports area and very luxurious games.

reviews.review_heading: Exceptional placements and industry connections, complimented by strong infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is so amazing and beautiful. The library and the material and books are so amazing. Classroom facilities and faculty members are also amazing. Wi-Fi facilities are there in college. Mess food is also good. Medical facilities, sports, and games are also amazing.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty members, facilities, food need improvement.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good, but the facilities need to be improved. There are times when water doesn't come in the washrooms, and being a girl, it's really difficult to deal with this. The library is very good, and a person who is willing to learn can make good use of it. The facilities of the hostel are not very good, but I feel like the new wardens are kind of good. At times, water isn't available in the hostels. The quality of the food in the mess is very bad. I lost all my mus...

review_content.Placements: Top roles offered in our course are MD Medicine, MS, General Surgeon, MD OBGY, MD Pediatrics, and MD Dermatology. Everyone gets internships. review_content.Infrastructure: Classrooms and labs are big enough and well ventilated to hold 100 students comfortably. The hostel is good. Hygiene is maintained on a regular basis. Medical and sports facilities are satisfactory. The mess is not good. It needs a serious upgrade. The canteen is good.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Our college provides good infrastructure and facilities.

review_content.Placements: All the students get into an internship for 1 year to get their degree. Around 50% of students get into PG on the first attempt and many more on their second attempt. Around 20% get into good eminent colleges. Many choose DNB Diploma after MBBS. We have many gold medalists from our college.
review_content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are large to accommodate 100 students. There are 2 libraries. Food is average. Cafeteria provides good food. Medical facilities are free of cost. There is a basketball court, football ground, and volleyball ground.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: It is a great campus with average connectivity and good infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: Over 60% of students gain seats in PG colleges all over India. Students can choose their streams, such as Medicine, Surgery, etc. And avail residency in the same. Internship is mandatory in our course and is done in collaboration with college and hospital itself.
review_content.Infrastructure: Hostels are of good quality, with 24-hour running water services. Twin sharing rooms with attached bathrooms are provided to all the students. The infrastructure in the college is good, especially in the labs. The classrooms can be improved as no air-conditioners are present, leading to suffocation and a hot environment inside. Mess is average but it is compulsory in the hostel.

content.Infrastructure: Hostels are of good quality, with 24-hour running water services. Twin sharing rooms with attached bathrooms are provided to all the students. The infrastructure in the college is good, especially in the labs. The classrooms can be improved as no air-conditioners are present, leading to suffocation and a hot environment inside. Mess is average but it is compulsory in the hostel.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: I am dissatisfied with the hostel quality. They have good facilities and labs with average teaching

content.Placements: Students after completing the course have opted to prepare for MD and further PG courses. The college has an average success rate. Apart from MBBS, our college also offers specific branch seats in PG, like Ortho, OBGY, and others. Stipends offered are too low for frontline workers.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel quality is above average, with an attached bathroom to a room shared by two students. However, running water is available only 2 hours a day which is a problem. Classrooms are good, equipped with projectors, wide benches, and are well ventilated.

reviews.review_heading: It is a great college. Placements are good and the faculty members are also helpful.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are good. The library is also good. Labs are good, and different types of facilities are available in this college. The infrastructure is good in this college. The hostel quality and environment are also good. It is good for studies. Food is also good in this hostel.

reviews.review_heading: It gives an enjoyable college life.
reviews.review_text: It had a very good campus but needed a bit of maintenance. Lectures were held in classrooms. Our college doesn't provide Wi-Fi and the mobile network was below average. It had a canteen that served food for students and teachers.

reviews.review_heading: That's enough I think, so give WBJEE examination and come to this college through counselling.
reviews.review_text: Course infrastructure is not good actually, due to lack to subject teachers, students are facing problems with various pharma subjects. B. pharma hostel available but d. Pharma hostel is unavailable. College canteen facility available but I think it charges high.

reviews.review_heading: A complete government course for studying pharmacy at extremely low cost.
reviews.review_text: As it’s the first Diploma in pharmacy college, the main building is quite old, there are labs for each subject, on various small buildings, three gallery and Wi-Fi is available. Diploma in pharmacy hostel has been destroyed in 2019, since then, the hostel facility of Diploma students is abolished. However, there are various paying guests near the college. There is a big playground besides the college and district hospital, Jalpaiguri.

reviews.review_heading: Institute of pharmacy jalpaiguri a good opportunity for your future.
reviews.review_text: Only B. pharma hostels are available D. Pharma hostels are not available for this moment due to maintenance purpose. Hostel facilities only available for boys accommodation not quite good enough. Yearly fees of hostel are small amounts, food facilities  are available only for b. pharma boys students.

reviews.review_heading: I had a bad experience at the college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very poor, There's no Wi-Fi available. The Labs are very much dirty, classrooms are not cleaned. There's no separated bathrooms for students. There is no hostel for the students. So I can' t say about the foods and medical facilities. Canteen food prices are high but quality is very much poor.

reviews.review_heading: This is the only government pharmacy college and it is very helpful to get a job.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of this college is not good. It is a state government college that's why lab materials are not well maintained. Wi-Fi is available, and they provide only 25 MB daily in the previous year. A canteen is available, but the food quality is not up to the mark.

reviews.review_heading: Good placement ,good faculty,
reviews.review_text: The classrooms are very good, neat, and clean, with a library present. The labs are also neat and clean, and the faculty is good. Students are motivated and interested, and the teacher-student interaction quality is very good. The faculty is expert, and the academic achievements are excellent.

reviews.review_heading: It is an amazing institute with all facilities.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms were large. There was no Wi-Fi. The library was small. The labs were well-maintained. The quality of food in the cafeteria was average. Medical facilities were available 24X7. Sports and games were organised regularly. Water supply was available 24X7. You can also stay outside.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is very good.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available in our college for every person. Labs are very good, and classrooms are clean every time. There is a library for every department with every book. Hostel quality is very good. Sports and games are very good, and there is a big ground in our college.
