reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Comprehensive review of Saraswati Medical College: facilities, education, and internships.

review_content.Placements: My college doesn't provide any placements because it's a medical college. This college provides courses for MBBS and nursing. It gives internship opportunities for at least 6 months. During this time period, students learn how to treat people and give them a good life.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is average because many buildings are still under construction and do not have proper functioning at all. Hostel is good for two people in a single room, but the mess food is average. It doesn't have free wi-fi. The hygiene of the hostel is also not good compared to other private medical colleges.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Saraswati medical College.

review_content.Placements: Placements are good but depend on marks and knowledge. Hospital across India is in Lacs. Around 100 students got internships and doing our college. The roles offered are mainly juniors and interns. Our college gives Rs.10,000 for internships.
review_content.Infrastructure: College has some facilities and lacks many facilities such as a gym, pool, etc. College provides a library, labs, and sports ground for outdoor and indoor games. The campus is very neat and green. Environment is good. It is on the highway so easy to transport.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: I am not satisfied with this college because I expected everything to be good.

review_content.Placements: Currently, they are all in internships and will be completing their internships in June 2022. Almost everybody is doing internships except a few who will be clearing their final exams. In the 2019 batch, it has not been a good start. Almost 50% of our batchmates have failed to clear the first year. Our previous senior of 2017 batch is also in not good shape, and many have failed their 2nd year and 3rd year of their medical exams.
review_content.Infrastructure: There are 3-LT i.e lecture halls. Almost all of them have air-conditioners. Projectors are available to teach the students with the help of presentations. White boards are available to make students understand something. Hostel food is average and can be improved. There are 2 messes for students to eat. Hostel rooms are for double accommodation.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: It's worth it. It is full of joy, happiness and peace.

review_content.Placements: In medical colleges, the placements are always good. It's tough to complete your MBBS, but once you come out of this, there are numerous opportunities and placements according to your knowledge. It gave me an opportunity to meet different people and learn many things. I have received great support from faculty members and the placement office. I am thankful to the training and placement cell for providing a platform to enhance my skills and giving me an opportunity to showcase them.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college is well-equipped with all the necessary equipment and facilities, including libraries, Wi-Fi, sports centres and laboratories. The college has even some classrooms equipped with air-conditioners. The canteen food is not very tasty, but it's not that bad too.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Saraswati Medical College, Unnao.

review_content.Placements: In our college, the first batch was started in 2016, and we will know the placement percentage this year. We are in the hope of getting a good percentage. They now got their internships, and we look forward to a good placement rate.
review_content.Infrastructure: The hostels are good with almost all the facilities required. Medical facilities are available as it is a medical college itself. We are provided with good quality food in our mess, and we have 2 different mess facilities. The infrastructure is developing day by day as the college is in its development phase.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: There are very nice faculty members here. It is a good college to become a doctor.

review_content.Placements: Our college offers an MBBS course, and there are a great number of patients here. We get to learn many things here. Internships are offered by our college only.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is quite good here. There are different departments for every subject and labs related to it. Our college has a museum and a mortuary, and there is a total of 4 lecture theatres. The library and reading room are also available here where we can find every book we need. Wi-Fi facility is available. The food served in the hostel is very nice, and hostel rooms are also huge with attached washrooms. Canteens and hospital services are available. There is a sports and indoor games room in the hostel. Our college provides food and lodging facilities to every student, faculty member, SRs, JRs and other nursing staff members.

college_info.intro: AIIMS Deoghar popular programmes are BSc and MBBS. MBBS students can become Hospital Administrators, Health Administrators, Faculty Members, Medical Writers, Healthcare Informatics, and others. MBBS students are trained to make use of the full potential of modern and advanced technology in their practice. Taking an MBBS course at AIIMS Deoghar means that students will have the option to choose from a wide range of specialisations, including Pediatrics, Surgery, Internal Medicine, Obstetrics and Gynaecology, Cardiology, Dermatology, Radiology, and others. Below mentioned are some of the popular courses offered by AIIMS Deoghar and their respective eligibility and AIIMS Deoghar fees:

faqs.answer: A:    Fees for various courses at AIIMS Deoghar vary depending on the program. Following are the fees structures for various course. Hostel fee for one year at AIIMS Deoghar is INR 59,9501 for every student pursuing any course.For B.Sc the fees is 2.4k per year for a 3 year course.MBBS course fee at AIIMS Deoghar is INR 26.4k for 5 year course. Additionally, the course fee for some specialties like Anatomy, Biochemistry, Community and Family Medicine, Pharmacology and Physiology is INR 2,292 per year.For specific information about fees for a particular course, candidates can refer to the following link:https://www.shiksha.com/university/aiims-deoghar-all-india-institute-of-medical-sciences-jharkhand-other-65979/courses
faqs.question: What is the fee for various courses at AIIMS Deoghar?

faqs.answer: A:    To be eligible for MBBS programme, candidate must have passed Class 12 with at least 50% aggregate in PCB stream with English as a compulsory subject.
faqs.question: What is the minimum eligibility criteria of AIIMS Deoghar MBBS programme?

faqs.answer: A:    AIIMS Deoghar is a public/government university, hence the fee is not much. The total tuition fee is around INR 4,500. This fee is exclusive of various charges such as hostel charges, lab charges, transportation fee, hostel charges, and others. For fee related updated please keep visiting the official website of the university.
faqs.question: Is pursuing MBBS at AIIMS Deoghar expensive?

faqs.answer: A:    No, It is not possible for you to get B.Sc at AIIMS Deoghar. In Round 4 of 2023 counselling,  579 was the most recent cutoff score for the B.Sc. Nursing programme at AIIMS Deoghar. This shows that candidates were not admitted to the B.Sc. Nursing programme at AIIMS Deoghar if their score was less than 579. The highly coveted B.Sc. Nursing programme at the prestigious AIIMS Deoghar is well-known. For the few available slots, this leads to intense competition.Even in the reserved groups (OBC, SC, ST), scores are typically still significantly higher than 480. To increase your chances of getting into AIIMS Deoghar or other esteemed institutes for a B.Sc. Nursing curriculum, aim for a significantly higher score on your next attempt at the NEET-UG. If you think your scores fall outside of the cutoff, you should apply to B.Sc. Nursing programmes at other colleges.

faqs.answer: Located in Jharkhand, India, AIIMS Deoghar is a public medical school and hospital. It is one of India's Institutes of National Importance, having been founded in 2019. A 125-seat MBBS course is available at AIIMS Deoghar. The programme lasts 5 years, with a 1-year rotating internship and 4.5 years of coursework. The Medical Council of India's (MCI) guidelines are adhered by the institute. Modern facilities may be found on the 237-acre campus of AIIMS Deoghar. With M.D. and M.S., the faculty at AIIMS Deoghar is well educated. Students think the teaching approach is outstanding. The infrastructure consists of the newest technology, a library, hostels, and functional blocks for OPD and IPD. The institute also provides programmes in DM/M.Ch, PhD, B.Sc. Nursing, and MD/MS.
faqs.question: Q: Is AIIMS Deoghar a good college for MBBS?

faqs.answer: The main entrance exam for MBBS admission at AIIMS Deoghar is NEET. To be eligible, you must score at least the minimum requirement for the General, OBC, SC, or ST categories in the National Eligibility Entrance Test (NEET-UG). Register for the Medical Counselling Committee's (MCC) online counselling programme as soon as you meet the requirements for NEET-UG.Please indicate your preferences for AIIMS Deoghar MBBS among other medical schools and programmes.MCC will assign seats to eligible applicants according on your NEET-UG score, category, preferences, and seat availability.In the event that your college offers you a place, you will receive a seat allotment letter. The minimal cutoff points are as follows: 6373 for General, 7123 for OBC, 42628 for SC, and 74873 for ST categories.

admission_overview.college_name: AIIMS Deoghar Admission 2025: Cutoff, Fees, Courses & Selection Process

admission_process.title: AIIMS Deoghar Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: AIIMS Deoghar admission process 2025is based on theentrance examfor UG and PG courses. The candidates can apply on the official website of the institute.AIIMS Deogharoffers various UG, PG and SS level programmes includingMBBS, BSc, MD/ MS, DM/ MChetc. MBBS is the most preferred course among all the courses at the institute.

To apply forAIIMS Deoghar MBBS admission, candidates must have at least50%-60% aggregatein Class 12 inthe PCB streamwithEnglishas a compulsory subject. Selection to MBBS is granted based onNEET UGscore followed by the counselling process.

For AIIMS Deoghar admission, candidates must fulfil the eligibility criteria for their desired course. Candidates must apply for NEET-UG conducted by NTA to gain admission to the MBBS programme.AIIMS Deoghar coursesalong with the eligibility criteria are given below:
Eligibility
Class 12 with at least 50% aggregate in PCB stream with English as a compulsory subject
MBBS degreewith 55% aggregate
MBBS degree with at least 55% aggregate + one year internship
AIIMS INI-SS
AIIMS PhD entrance exam

AIIMS Deoghar fee has multiple components, out of which some are paid one-time while others are paid semester-wise. ne-time fee isINR 100for BSc andINR 125for MBBS. The components include tuition fees, caution deposits, hostel and mess charges, etc. Aspirants are required to pay this fee at the time of admission and then semester-wise. Find below the course-wiseAIIMS Deoghar fee:
Note:Candidates must note that this information is sourced from the official website of the institute/university sanctioning body and is subject to change.

AIIMS Deoghar seat intake may also vary as per the course type. Candidates have to qualify for the entrance exam accepted for the applied course. Candidates once selected will need to pay a course fee to confirm their seat in the institute. Below is AIIMS Deoghar course-wise intake:
Note:This information is sourced from the official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

Candidates seeking admission to AIIMS Deoghar courses need to meet the above-mentioned eligibility criteria and appear for the national-level or college-level entrance examination. AIIMS Deoghar MBBS admission, requires a valid score in the NEET entrance exam, while INI CET score for MD/MS. Below is the step-by-step process for AIIMS Deoghar admission:
Step 1: Application
Step 2: Appear for the Entrance Test
Candidates need to appear for entrance exams for their respective courses.
Step 3: Counselling
After the selection, candidates are required to attend theNEET counselling for MBBS(whichever is applicable) and the filling process.
Step 4: Seat Allotment
The seats will be allotted to the students on the basis of the chosen course during counselling for MBBS.
Step 5: Pay the Admission Fee/ Reporting
Selected candidates need to pay the admission fee to secure a seat at AIIMS Deoghar.

In order to clear NEET UG, a good preparation strategy is a must. In general, students planning to appear for the exam must start preparing at least two years in advance, i.e. from Class 11 onwards. Some preparation tips to ace the national-level medical test are as follows:
Check more ontips and preparation strategies for NEET UG.

faqs.question: How are B Sc placements at Medical College, Kolkata?
faqs.answer: Placements are average in this college. We can do private practice after MBBS course. All our course students get internships after completing 4 years. Students have to do a 1-year mandatory internship. After the internship, our college offers a house staff ship programme in different departments of a hospital. he Calcutta National Medical College gives admission to a total of 250 students in the MBBS course through AQI and SQ. After passing the MBBS, they are eligible to appear for the posts like a medical officer and RMO in public or private health care. Around 250 students were placed in our course. The highest salary package offered was 12 LPA. The lowest salary package offered was 10 LPA. The top recruiting companies were Dams, Marrow, Prepladder, and eGurukul. Almost 90% of students got internships from our course. The role offered was general physician. Most of the students get selected for Housestaffship and rest apply for General duty reserve medical officer and prepare for post graduation. Everyone got internship in our college. During internship they got 29000 stiped and housestaffship is 45000.

description: AIIMS Deoghar cutoff 2025 is available on this page for various accepting exams. Candidates can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the cutoff details across different rounds and categories. Other important updates are as follows:

AIIMS Deoghar cutoff 2024 has been released for NEET UG, detailing both opening and closing ranks across the General, OBC, SC, ST, EWS, and PWD categories. The AIIMS Deoghar NEET UG cutoff 2025 will be published following the announcement of the NEET UG 2025 result. In the meantime, candidates seeking admission to AIIMS Deoghar can refer to the table below to review the NEET UG and INI CET cutoff ranks for the past three years across various courses, specialisations and categories.

AIIMS Deoghar NEET UG cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final seat allotment result for admission to the MBBS course. The cutoff was released for several categories belonging to the AI quota. For the General AI quota, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 9475 for MBBS admission. Candidates can refer to the table below to view the first and last round cutoffs 2025 for the General AI category students.

AIIMS Deoghar MBBS cutoff 2025 was 9475 for the students belonging to the General AI quota. Similarly, for the OBC category students, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 12393 for admission to the MBBS course. Comparing both categories, the cutoff rank was more competitive for the General category students as compared to the OBC category for MBBS admission. For other categories and rounds, use the provided filters.

AIIMS Deoghar accepts the NEET UG entrance exam for selecting students to the MBBS course. Candidates with a valid score are then eligible for the NEET UG counselling. For 2026 admission, aspirants must refer to the table below to view some of the important NEET UG 2026 dates to be eligible for admission.

Candidates preparing for admission can refer to the table below to view or download the NEET UG round and year-wise consolidated cutoff list. This will help students to understand the past three years' cutoff trends.
AIIMS Deoghar INI CET cutoff 2026 has been released for the postgraduate courses MD, MS, M.Ch., etc. At Round 3, the closing ranks ranged from 151 to 10680 for students in the General AI quota.

Considering the ranks, the most competitive for admission was MD in General Medicine, with a lowest cutoff rank of 151. On the otherhand, the least competitive was MD in Biochemistry, with INI CET 2026 cutoff rank of for admission in the General category.

In the table below, candidates can find the INI CET round- and category-wise cut-off details for admission to various PG medical courses. For General AI category students, the top three most competitive courses for admission were MD in General Medicine, MS in General Surgery and MS in Ophthalmology, with Round 3 closing ranks of 151, 715 and 1369, respectively.

INI CET counselling is conducted in four rounds: mock round, first round, second round, and open round. All the rounds of counselling are conducted online. Candidates appearing for admission via INI CET can refer to the table provided below to view or download the round and year-wise INI CET cutoff lists.
AIIMS Deoghar B.Sc. cutoff 2025 was 1929 in the last round. In 2024, the last round closing rank for the same course was 2100 for the students belonging to the General AI quota.
For the OBC category students, the AIIMS Nursing cutoff 2025 for the B.Sc. course was 3487 in the last round. For other categories and rounds, use the provided filters.

The AIIMS Deoghar cutoff 2025 has been released based on the AIIMS Paramedical exam. The cutoff was released for different categories such as General, OBC, SC, ST and EWS categories belonging to the All India quota. The cutoff range among the General AI category was between 162 and 513.

review_content.Placements: Most of the students have been placed well and are now well settled in their lives. A student can also open his/her own hospital or clinic or join any private hospital to treat patients post completing this course. All students got internships in different ayurvedic as well as allopathic hospitals.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college has a good infrastructure with each classroom equipped with a projector and a sound system. Posting of students start from the second year where students interact with the patients in OPD as well as IPD. Special practical rooms are present for different subjects. The college has both boys and girls hostels but mess service is not available in the hostel.

reviews_list.batch_info: BAMS - Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: It is a good college with cooperative teachers.

review_content.Placements: Our course is a medical course, and the intake in our college is 125 for UG and around 60 for PG. Salary packages and companies are offered in medical colleges. Internships are done by everyone after their final year, which will be 6 months in our college, 3 months in GMC and 3 months PHC.
review_content.Infrastructure: All the facilities are available, but the condition of infrastructure is not that good. Hostel facilities are very well. We do not have any compensation for eating the mess food, and we can have it of our choice. Sports and games are not good, and everyone is very busy that they do not perform sports. Only during the gathering, we have sports.

reviews_list.batch_info: BAMS - Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: Not satisfied with the sports events.

review_content.Placements: As a medical field, this college delivers well in case of post-graduation. The average number of students getting their PG seats are more in number.
review_content.Infrastructure: Students are not getting hostel. The overall infrastructure is not good. Wi-Fi and labs are not available. Library is somehow well in infrastructure. So. might be 50-50. The college's infrastructure is in renewal. So it may get better with time.
review_content.Faculty: Teachers available here are well-educated. They are highly experienced. They do their job properly. Every single teacher favors the student. The percentage of students clearing the university is more in number compared to other colleges. Overall teaching is top-class, and no audit is available. Good in the case of teaching, but not many appliances are available for learning.

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Computer Science - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Overall, the best college for M.Sc. in Computer Science course.

content.Placements: The students' placement rate is 93%. The maximum contribution is 27 LPA, while the minimum is 2 LPA. Recruitment companies such as Airbnb, Netflix, Apple, and many others have participated. Roles offered are data architect, statistician, and various others. Many students have received internships.
content.Infrastructure: The hotels are old, so the hotel facilities are relatively good. Hostel food is manageable. However, the layout of the main lecture hall, library, CSC, Dogra Hall, and assembly halls is good. The Wi-Fi speed is decent, but there is a daily limit of 10GB, this excess usually leads to a temporary ban.

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Computer Science - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Overall, it is the best college for the M.Sc. in Computer Science course.

content.Placements: M.Sc. in Computer Science at our college provides opportunities for students. In the past two semesters, almost all students had the chance to get placed, and about 60-65% of students succeeded in our course. Top recruiting companies in the college include Tech Mahindra, Capgemini, Intel, etc. The average package offered in this college ranges from 10-20 LPA. Top roles offered are software engineer, machine learning engineer, etc. Many students also got internships.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are properly furnished with a projector, speaker, board, air-conditioning, and feature comfortable seating for students. Wi-Fi service is available 24x7 on campus. Locker service is provided for all students in the department building. Two generous living rooms are available, while bathrooms are equipped with individual geysers. Meals in the mess are mediocre.

individual_reviews.title: Review in the Shiksha college.

Top recruiting companies visited our college to hire students for work in their atmosphere. The percentage of students got internships in this course was 90 percent.
content.Infrastructure: All the facilities were available for the students in my course. Infrastructure of college was also superb. Wi-Fi, classroom, library, and all things were present for the students. The quality of food in college canteen was so tasty and healthy. Medical facility was available but sports and games were not present.

individual_reviews.course: B.Com. in International Business - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: It is a great college to focus on life, with good infrastructure and facilities.

content.Placements: 60 out of the applied 45 students (75%) of students got placed. The highest package is 8 LPA, the lowest is 2 LPA, and the average is 6 LPA. Top roles offered in tax and audit.
content.Infrastructure: Classroom with projector and computers, and a large library with all books useful for international business subjects. No hostel is provided; it is a large campus on Street Number 6 near Lifestyle Lane in a housing area. individual_reviews.course: B.Com. in Accounting and Finance - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: I'm satisfied with completing my degree from this college.

content.Placements: We have a placement cell present in our college, which takes care of all the placement activities day to day. Top companies come here to recruit the students who are performing outstandingly in academics as well as extracurricular activities. They offer top roles with good packages.
content.Infrastructure: Having studied here for 3 complete years, I can really say I appreciate the campus and its infrastructure facilities. It is clean and hygienic in every corner of the campus, and we have very functional labs and a big and well-stocked library. We have an indoor stadium present and a clean and hygienic canteen.

paragraphs: St. Francis College for Women admission2025 is both merit and entrance-based. The college offers 43 programmes at the UG and PG levels in various fields, including Medicine and Health Sciences, Business and Management Studies, IT and Software, Accounting and Commerce, Arts ( Fine / Visual / Performing ), Mass Communication and Media, Humanities and Social Sciences and Science, etc. The mode of study for the offered courses is full time. The institute accepts exams, such as CAT, MAT, and NEET PG, for admission to some specificSt. Francis College for Women courses. For certain programmes, the college considers the merit of the last qualifying exam of candidates, ensuring a comprehensive approach to admissions. Read more details around St. Francis College for Women admission in the following article.

nirf.description:
Based on the rankings from NIRF, St. Francis College for Women outperformed numerous other institutes, securing a higher position, indicating that the institute is considered to be doing better in various factors evaluated by the NIRF ranking system. In the 'Colleges' category, the institute's ranks have dropped in comparison with last year's ranking. In 2025, St. Francis College for Women fell 50 ranks to #151 rank in the 'Colleges' category by the NIRF ranking. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has slipped in the rankings.

outlook.description:
St. Francis College for Women has received strong ranks by the Outlook-ICARE under the 'Science' category. Provided parameters including, Teaching, Graduation Outcome, Inclusivity and Research, the institute is ranked in a good position as compared to other institutes by the Outlook-ICARE 2025. In the 'Science' category, the institute's ranks have shown stability when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2025, St. Francis College for Women's rank is #34, the same as last year's rank in the 'Science' category by the Outlook-ICARE ranking.
One can observe that within the category of 'Arts', the institute's ranking has steadiness when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2025, St. Francis College for Women's rank is #42, the same as last year's rank in the 'Arts' category by the Outlook-ICARE ranking.
It is to be noticed that the institute has shown a fluctuating trend in the 'Commerce' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2025, St. Francis College for Women's rank is #35, the same as last year's rank in the 'Commerce' category by the Outlook-ICARE ranking.

Locker service is provided for all students in the department building. Two generous living rooms are available, while bathrooms are equipped with individual geysers. Meals in the mess are mediocre.

reviews.review_heading: Review in the Shiksha college.
reviews.review_text: All the facilities were available for the students in my course. Infrastructure of college was also superb. Medical facility was available but sports and games were not present.

reviews.review_heading: It is a great college to focus on life, with good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Classroom with projector and computers, and a large library with all books useful for international business subjects. No hostel is provided; it is a large campus on Street Number 6 near Lifestyle Lane in a housing area. There is a gym and a large indoor stadium at the college for sports like basketball and badminton. The canteen food is average.

reviews.review_heading: I'm satisfied with completing my degree from this college.
reviews.review_text: Having studied here for 3 complete years, I can really say I appreciate the campus and its infrastructure facilities. It is clean and hygienic in every corner of the campus, and we have very functional labs and a big and well-stocked library. We have an indoor stadium present and a clean and hygienic canteen.

reviews.review_heading: Review by Anjali Kolli of St. Francis College for Women.
reviews.review_text: The facilities available in this course are so superb, the classrooms are so good, but Wi-Fi is not present in my college. The quality of food in my college canteen is good. Medical facilities are available, but sports and games are available in my course.

reviews.review_heading: I like this college as I have more access to the courses here.
reviews.review_text: As a science student, I really appreciate the infrastructure and facilities in this college. As we spend more of our time in labs rather than classrooms, we clearly observed our labs to be well-equipped and functional that we can easily access anything we want.

reviews.review_heading: I am completely satisfied with this campus case, and I wanted to join this for a long back.
reviews.review_text: We have a well-maintained campus and well-furnished benches, tables, and a chair. It has well-equipped labs. It has a very big and neatly arranged library. We have an indoor stadium, various playgrounds and a neat, clean and hygienic canteen where we have a lot of varieties and fresh food.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied joining this college because my parents wanted me to join, and I like it too.
reviews.review_text: Our college campus is well-maintained, with well-ventilated classrooms and well-furnished benches, tables, and chairs. It has well-equipped labs, a large library, and a hygienic canteen. The quality of food is also good, and we often play in our indoor stadium.

reviews.review_heading: Utilising the resources you have.
reviews.review_text: Overall college is giving its best to help students acquire or gain as much knowledge as they can. I live in a private hostel as our college won't have a college hostel. The food in our hostel is okay.

reviews.review_heading: As a woman, I like this college and it offers us good placements.
reviews.review_text: At my college, we have many strict rules, and we must follow them. The security is very good as it is a women's college. We are required to wear the dress code given by the college. We have 24/7 medical facilities and a Wi-Fi campus. We can play many games and sports.

reviews.review_heading: A college where an individual can find responsibility and concentration on their career.
reviews.review_text: Our college infrastructure is well-constructed and well-maintained. We have fully equipped classes with projectors, fully equipped labs, and a library. We have a clean and hygienic mess and canteen. We even have a health centre and an indoor stadium too.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good placements and campus life.
reviews.review_text: The college has good Wi-Fi, and vast library with numerous books for people of all courses, and a good seating area with ventilation and an internet lab. Computer labs and science labs are equipped with the latest technology and good facilities with proper seating, availability, and air conditioning.

reviews.review_heading: Review of St. Francis College for Women
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available in my college are so good. Wi-Fi, classrooms, and library are all present in my college. The quality and facilities of the hostel are so good, and the food is delicious. Medical facilities are also present, and sports and games are available in my course.
